meta.style_note: PURE CHARACTER ILLUSTRATION ONLY. No card frame, no text, no stats, no UI, no borders.

base_style: Korean mobile gacha game character portrait. 512x512 square. Korean manhwa/webtoon illustration, semi-realistic, clean lines, vibrant warm colors. Warm golden bokeh background with sparkle particles and amber-cream gradient. Bust-up portrait, 3/4 angle. PURE illustration only — no text, no card UI, no frames, no labels. The character must look 100% human.

characters.name: 박하린
characters.title: 혈연센터장
characters.prompt: Female Korean blood center director, mid-30s. Charismatic leader with a calculating mind behind a warm smile. Short wavy dark brown hair, sharp intelligent eyes. Wearing a crisp white doctor's coat over a wine-red blouse, gold-framed glasses pushed up on forehead. Holding a tablet with charts. Confident, composed expression with a hint of hidden ambition.

characters.name: 김도윤
characters.title: 신입 간호사
characters.prompt: Male Korean rookie nurse, early 20s. Fresh-faced, innocent-looking young man. Soft black hair, slightly tousled. Bright earnest dark eyes full of idealism. Clean white nurse uniform, still crisp and new. Stethoscope around his neck. Cheerful thumbs-up with a big genuine smile. Radiating youthful energy and naivety.

characters.name: 이서연
characters.title: 베테랑 채혈사
characters.prompt: Female Korean veteran phlebotomist, early 30s. Professional woman with sharp, observant features. Dark hair in a neat low ponytail. Piercing dark eyes with a slightly skeptical look. Clean white nurse uniform with red cross emblem. Blue surgical gloves, holding a blood collection needle with expert confidence. Slight analytical frown.

characters.name: 카르테인 듀크
characters.title: 혈액관리국장
characters.prompt: Male European aristocrat, appears 40s but timeless. Handsome, commanding presence. Slicked-back silver-streaked dark hair. Intense grey-blue eyes, magnetic gaze. Perfectly tailored black three-piece suit with a crimson silk cravat. Gold cufflinks with a family crest. Holding a crystal wine glass with dark red liquid. Elegant, dangerous charisma — a refined predator hiding in plain sight.

characters.name: 최민서
characters.title: 단골 헌혈자
characters.prompt: Male Korean regular blood donor, mid-40s. Friendly, sturdy middle-aged man. Short-cropped black hair with some grey. Kind crinkly eyes with laugh lines. Casual polo shirt with blood donation volunteer vest. A '300회 헌혈' medal pinned proudly. Rolling up one sleeve showing a small bandage. Big warm dad-smile — the neighborhood hero.

characters.name: 정우진
characters.title: 혈액운송기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood transport driver, late 20s. Friendly, reliable-looking young man. Messy dark hair under a navy cap with blood center logo. Warm brown eyes with a laid-back but trustworthy look. Dark blue delivery uniform jacket with reflective stripes. Holding car keys and a sealed cold-storage container. Slight knowing grin.

characters.name: 빅토르 헤센
characters.title: 카르테인 집사
characters.prompt: Male elderly European butler, late 60s. Dignified with perfect posture. Neatly combed white hair, clean-shaven. Calm, loyal grey-blue eyes. Impeccable black butler's tailcoat with white gloves. Small gold family crest pin on lapel. Holding a silver tray with a sealed envelope. Serene, devoted expression — the perfect servant.

characters.name: 한소율
characters.title: 대학생 봉사자
characters.prompt: Female Korean college student volunteer, early 20s. Trendy, bright young woman. Long straight dark hair with subtle highlights. Lively sparkling dark brown eyes. Cute pink volunteer T-shirt with blood donation campaign logo. Holding her phone taking a selfie. Peace sign with the other hand. Cheerful, bubbly Gen-Z energy.

characters.name: 나이젤 크로우
characters.title: 야간 감사관
characters.prompt: Male British night auditor, 50s. Thin, sharp-featured man with an unsettling calm. Receding dark hair combed back precisely. Pale grey eyes behind wire-rimmed glasses. Dark charcoal suit, slightly old-fashioned cut. Leather-bound ledger tucked under one arm, fountain pen in breast pocket. Expression of someone who has seen every lie in the book.

characters.name: 윤채아
characters.title: 혈액연구원
characters.prompt: Female Korean blood researcher, late 20s. Smart, focused woman with glasses. Straight dark hair in a neat shoulder-length cut. Analytical dark eyes behind round silver-framed glasses. White lab coat over light blue shirt. Holding a test tube rack with blood samples, examining one closely. Focused intellectual expression.

characters.name: 신유진
characters.title: 접수 담당자
characters.prompt: Female Korean receptionist, mid-20s. Neat, professional young woman. Short dark hair in a tidy bob with bangs. Serious determined dark brown eyes. Clean white blouse with blood center name tag. Sitting at reception with computer monitor visible. Holding registration form and pen. Earnest no-nonsense expression.

characters.name: 오태현
characters.title: 혈액분석사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood analyst, early 30s. Clean-cut, serious man. Short neat black hair, side-parted. Focused dark eyes with calm precise gaze. White lab coat with blood center emblem. Looking at blood analysis chart on clipboard. Pen in shirt pocket, ID badge visible. Professional methodical expression.

characters.name: 양미라
characters.title: 헌혈 홍보대사
characters.prompt: Female Korean blood donation ambassador, mid-30s. Warm beautiful woman with radiant smile. Long wavy dark brown hair. Bright sincere dark eyes full of warmth. Stylish red blazer with blood donation campaign ribbon pin. Microphone headset on one ear. Holding promotional materials with heart designs. Genuinely warm inspirational expression.

characters.name: 엘레나 모르간
characters.title: 야행성 수습생
characters.prompt: Female young European woman, early 20s. Pretty with a slightly sleepy look. Wavy light brown hair, slightly messy. Soft hazel eyes, half-lidded and drowsy but alert. Dark navy work uniform with Kartein crest patch on sleeve. Coffee cup in one hand, documents in other. Trying to hide a yawn — cute but dedicated.

characters.name: 세르게이 볼코프
characters.title: 동유럽 연락관
characters.prompt: Male Eastern European liaison, late 30s. Rugged serious Slavic man with strong jaw. Short dark blonde hair, military cut. Cold grey eyes, watchful and calculating. Dark leather jacket over black turtleneck. Small earpiece in one ear. Arms crossed in guarded posture. Stoic, reliable, slightly intimidating.

characters.name: 이사도라 카르테인
characters.title: 가문 장녀
characters.prompt: Female European noblewoman, appears late 20s but timeless. Stunningly beautiful with an otherworldly grace. Long flowing platinum blonde hair with silver highlights. Piercing violet-grey eyes. Elegant black evening gown with ruby necklace. Delicate lace gloves. A single red rose in hand. Expression of cold beauty and absolute authority — the family heir.

characters.name: 디미트리 라드
characters.title: 혈액 감정사
characters.prompt: Male Eastern European blood connoisseur, appears 30s. Handsome with refined aristocratic features. Dark wavy hair swept back. Deep burgundy-brown eyes with a knowing look. Burgundy velvet blazer over black shirt. Swirling a wine glass with dark red liquid, examining it like a sommelier. Sophisticated, slightly decadent expression.

characters.name: 박은지
characters.title: 의대생 실습생
characters.prompt: Female Korean medical student intern, early 20s. Cute youthful woman with slightly confused expression. Dark hair in high ponytail with loose strands. Wide curious dark brown eyes. Short white lab coat with 'Intern' badge. Holding medical textbook and looking at blood bag with surprise. Mix of curiosity and slight concern.

characters.name: 장현우
characters.title: 보건복지부 조사관
characters.prompt: Male Korean government health inspector, early 40s. Authoritative clean-cut man. Short black hair with grey at temples. Stern evaluating dark eyes. Navy government suit with health ministry ID badge on lanyard. Tablet with inspection checklist. Straight posture, clipboard under arm. Fair but rigid rule-follower expression.

characters.name: 김서하
characters.title: 의료 전문기자
characters.prompt: Female Korean medical journalist, late 20s. Sharp determined stylish woman. Chic black bob cut above shoulders. Fierce dark brown eyes full of curiosity. Beige trench coat over white blouse. Press ID on red lanyard. Holding digital voice recorder and notebook. Confident ambitious expression.

characters.name: 권지혜
characters.title: 야간 경비원
characters.prompt: Female Korean night security guard, late 30s. Tough, no-nonsense woman with athletic build. Dark hair pulled back in tight bun. Alert dark eyes that miss nothing. Dark navy security uniform with flashlight on belt. Walkie-talkie in one hand. Standing with arms behind back, military-straight posture. Stoic protective expression.

characters.name: 유재환
characters.title: 시설관리 기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean facility maintenance engineer, late 40s. Dependable working-class man with weathered hands. Short grey-streaked hair, slightly messy. Warm tired eyes. Grey-blue work coveralls with tool belt. Wrench in one hand, wiping sweat with the other. Friendly reliable expression — the guy who keeps everything running.

characters.name: 송민지
characters.title: 혈액은행 사서
characters.prompt: Female Korean blood bank librarian/cataloger, mid-20s. Quiet meticulous woman. Straight black hair with reading glasses on nose tip. Gentle focused dark eyes. White lab coat with a clipboard full of labels. Organizing blood bags by type in a refrigeration unit. Calm methodical expression — she knows where every drop is.

characters.name: 남기현
characters.title: 응급의학과 의사
characters.prompt: Male Korean ER doctor, mid-35s. Intense focused man who runs on coffee. Dark hair slightly disheveled from long shifts. Sharp dark eyes with dark circles underneath. Wrinkled blue scrubs under white coat, stethoscope around neck. Checking a patient chart urgently. Exhausted but unwavering determination.

characters.name: 백수진
characters.title: 감염관리 전문간호사
characters.prompt: Female Korean infection control nurse specialist, early 30s. Meticulous woman with perfectionist aura. Hair in tight bun under surgical cap. Keen observant eyes behind protective goggles pushed up. Full PPE gown partially unzipped, N95 mask hanging around neck. Holding disinfectant spray. Stern but caring expression.

characters.name: 차동혁
characters.title: IT 보안 담당자
characters.prompt: Male Korean IT security specialist, late 20s. Tech-savvy introvert. Messy black hair, pale from screen time. Sharp analytical eyes behind blue-light glasses. Dark hoodie under a lab coat, multiple monitors reflected in glasses. Holding a laptop showing encrypted data streams. Focused slightly paranoid expression — he sees patterns everywhere.

characters.name: 임예지
characters.title: 혈소판 성분채혈사
characters.prompt: Female Korean platelet apheresis technician, mid-25s. Gentle precise woman. Shoulder-length brown hair with soft curls. Kind patient dark eyes. White uniform with specialized apheresis machine beside her. Adjusting centrifuge tubes carefully. Warm reassuring expression — patients trust her completely.

characters.name: 고승우
characters.title: 혈액품질관리 팀장
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood quality control team leader, late 30s. Perfectionist with military-like discipline. Neatly combed black hair, clean jaw. Intense focused dark eyes. Pristine white lab coat with gold QC badge. Inspecting a blood bag under UV light. Arms behind back when not working. Uncompromising quality-first expression.

characters.name: 황나리
characters.title: 센터 부센터장
characters.prompt: Female Korean deputy center director, early 40s. Elegant and politically savvy. Styled dark hair in a professional updo. Sharp intelligent eyes with crow's feet from smiling. Navy blazer with pearl earrings. Reading financial reports with reading glasses. Diplomatic smile that never reveals her true thoughts.

characters.name: 문태식
characters.title: 백십자재단 이사장
characters.prompt: Male Korean foundation chairman, late 50s. Distinguished silver-haired leader. Perfectly groomed salt-and-pepper hair. Deep wise dark eyes that have seen decades of secrets. Expensive charcoal suit with white pocket square and foundation pin. Sitting in a leather chair, hands folded. Benevolent patriarch expression hiding immense power.

characters.name: 세실리아 카르테인
characters.title: 가문 여주인
characters.prompt: Female European matriarch, appears 40s but ageless. Breathtaking beauty with terrifying poise. Long dark auburn hair cascading over shoulders. Deep emerald green eyes, hypnotic. Midnight blue velvet dress with antique cameo brooch. Black lace shawl. Holding an ornate hand mirror. Serene expression of someone who controls empires from the shadows.

characters.name: 루시우스 카르테인
characters.title: 가문 차남
characters.prompt: Male European young nobleman, appears mid-20s. Rebellious second son. Tousled platinum hair with dark roots. Bright steel-blue eyes with defiant spark. Designer leather jacket over silk shirt, top buttons undone. Silver chain necklace. Leaning against a wall with crossed arms. Cocky smirk — dangerous charm meets aristocratic arrogance.

characters.name: 마들렌 보스
characters.title: 카르테인 의전관
characters.prompt: Female German protocol officer, appears 30s. Impossibly elegant and precise. Ash blonde hair in a perfect chignon. Cool ice-blue eyes. Tailored dove-grey suit with white gloves. Clipboard with gold pen. Every hair in place, every gesture calculated. Polite but cold expression — the gatekeeper.

characters.name: 알드릭 쏜
characters.title: 카르테인 경호대장
characters.prompt: Male British head of security, appears 40s. Massive, scarred warrior in a suit. Shaved head with a thin scar across the left eyebrow. Steel-grey eyes, constantly scanning. Black tactical suit with an earpiece. Hands clasped in front — ready to move instantly. Intimidating protective presence, zero expression.

characters.name: 아나이스 보몽
characters.title: 향혈사
characters.prompt: Female French blood sommelier, appears late 20s. Sensual and mysterious. Dark curly hair tumbling past shoulders. Deep amber-brown eyes with a knowing warmth. Burgundy silk blouse with antique gold locket. Holding a crystal vial of crimson liquid up to the light, examining it like perfume. Connoisseur's expression — savoring secrets.

characters.name: 오토 브란트
characters.title: 카르테인 회계사
characters.prompt: Male German accountant, appears 50s. Meticulous, nervous man. Thin grey hair, balding. Watery blue eyes behind thick round glasses. Rumpled brown suit with ink stains. Surrounded by stacked ledgers and financial documents. Perpetually anxious expression — he knows where every coin goes and it terrifies him.

characters.name: 리나 산토스
characters.title: 필리핀 채혈 조수
characters.prompt: Female Filipino blood collection assistant, mid-20s. Quick, resourceful young woman. Black hair in a practical short bob. Dark warm eyes with street-smart alertness. Dark navy medical scrubs with Kartein patch. Preparing blood collection kit with practiced efficiency. Determined expression — escaped poverty through this job, loyal to a fault.

characters.name: 카스파 렌
characters.title: 정보 수집가
characters.prompt: Male ambiguous-European information broker, appears 30s. Chameleon-like man who blends anywhere. Nondescript brown hair, average build. Forgettable face except for unsettlingly perceptive hazel eyes. Grey raincoat over casual clothes. Multiple phones in pockets. Slight smile — he already knows your secrets.

characters.name: 나디아 페트로바
characters.title: 혈액 운반 코디네이터
characters.prompt: Female Russian logistics coordinator, early 30s. Cool and efficient. Platinum blonde hair in a severe ponytail. Icy blue eyes. Black turtleneck with a cargo vest full of pockets. Tablet showing shipping routes on a map. Bluetooth earpiece. All-business expression — she runs the shadow supply chain.

characters.name: 유민재
characters.title: 택시 기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean taxi driver, early 50s. Chatty everyman who knows every street. Thinning hair under a newsboy cap. Friendly squinting eyes. Worn leather jacket over a checkered shirt. One hand on steering wheel, other holding a thermos of coffee. Gap-toothed grin — he drives the night shift and sees everything.

characters.name: 소연희
characters.title: 편의점 야간 알바
characters.prompt: Female Korean convenience store night worker, early 20s. Bored but observant. Dyed light brown hair in messy bun. Tired but sharp dark eyes. Yellow convenience store uniform apron. Chin resting on one hand at the counter, earbuds in. Unimpressed expression — but she notices the weird customers at 3 AM.

characters.name: 배종호
characters.title: 퇴직 형사
characters.prompt: Male Korean retired detective, late 50s. Grizzled veteran with a gut feeling something is wrong. Grey crew cut. Weathered face with deep-set suspicious dark eyes. Worn brown leather jacket, hands in pockets. Unlit cigarette behind ear. Squinting into the distance. Expression of a man who can't stop investigating.

characters.name: 안수영
characters.title: 동네 약사
characters.prompt: Female Korean neighborhood pharmacist, mid-40s. Warm community figure. Permed dark hair, gentle round face. Kind eyes behind tortoise-shell glasses. White pharmacist coat with a name tag. Measuring medicine behind a counter full of labeled drawers. Motherly expression — she notices when patients look too pale.

characters.name: 홍태준
characters.title: 열혈 유튜버
characters.prompt: Male Korean YouTuber/streamer, early 20s. Hyperactive content creator. Dyed blonde hair with dark roots, styled messily. Bright excited eyes. Colorful graphic hoodie with LED ring light reflected in his eyes. Holding a camera and a microphone. Wide enthusiastic grin — he wants to film inside the blood center for views.

characters.name: 강미래
characters.title: 사회복지사
characters.prompt: Female Korean social worker, early 30s. Compassionate but pragmatic. Shoulder-length dark hair, natural look. Warm empathetic dark eyes with slight fatigue. Simple cardigan over a blouse, tote bag full of documents. Holding a case file folder. Caring but burdened expression — she connects the dots others miss.

characters.name: 서필성
characters.title: 국과수 법의학자
characters.prompt: Male Korean forensic scientist, mid-40s. Detached analytical mind. Neat salt-and-pepper hair. Cold objective dark eyes behind rimless glasses. Blue forensic lab coat, latex gloves. Examining a microscope slide with blood samples. Utterly emotionless expression — for him, blood is just evidence.

characters.name: 채아린
characters.title: 의료 로비스트
characters.prompt: Female Korean medical lobbyist, late 38s. Polished political operator. Sleek dark hair in a perfect bob. Calculating dark eyes. Expensive cream-colored suit with pearl earrings. Holding a smartphone with legislative contacts. Red lipstick, confident stance. Smile that promises favors and expects returns.

characters.name: 원현수
characters.title: 보험사 조사관
characters.prompt: Male Korean insurance investigator, mid-30s. Persistent, detail-oriented man. Short black hair, slightly receding. Narrowed suspicious dark eyes. Plain grey suit with loosened tie. Carrying a thick manila folder of claim reports. Pen tapping against chin. Expression of someone following a trail of suspicious claims.

characters.name: 류승민
characters.title: 경찰청 사이버수사대
characters.prompt: Male Korean cyber crime investigator, early 30s. Sharp modern cop. Clean-cut with styled dark hair. Intelligent dark eyes reflecting monitor screens. Police windbreaker over smart casual. Dual monitors showing data analysis. Badge on belt. Determined focused expression — he's tracing digital footprints of blood shipments.

characters.name: 조은영
characters.title: 국정원 요원
characters.prompt: Female Korean intelligence agent, mid-35s. Unreadable, dangerous woman. Dark hair in a simple low ponytail. Dark eyes that reveal nothing. Plain black suit, no jewelry, no distinguishing features. Hands folded in front. Standing perfectly still. Expression of controlled blankness — a professional observer who could be anyone.

characters.name: 가브리엘 신부
characters.title: 바티칸 조사관
characters.prompt: Male Italian Catholic priest investigator, 50s. Weathered man of faith pursuing darkness. Silver-streaked dark hair. Compassionate but fierce brown eyes. Black cassock with Roman collar, simple wooden cross. Worn leather satchel with ancient texts. Rosary in one hand. Expression of righteous determination — he hunts what others deny exists.

characters.name: 민하영
characters.title: 헌혈 자원봉사 팀장
characters.prompt: Female Korean volunteer coordinator, late 20s. Organized and cheerful. Dark hair in a neat side braid. Bright energetic dark eyes. Red volunteer vest with multiple event badges. Clipboard and megaphone. Enthusiastic hand gesture. Beaming leader expression — she makes donation drives happen.

characters.name: 정시우
characters.title: 혈액 냉동보관 기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood cryo-storage technician, mid-30s. Sturdy quiet man who works in the cold. Short-cropped dark hair. Calm steady dark eyes. Thick insulated work jacket with frost on shoulders. Carrying frozen blood plasma containers. Slight shiver but determined. Stoic reliable expression — guardian of the deep freeze.

characters.name: 표유나
characters.title: 소아과 연계 간호사
characters.prompt: Female Korean pediatric liaison nurse, late 20s. Gentle soul who works with sick children. Soft wavy dark hair. Warm teary-eyed expression of deep empathy. Pastel pink scrubs with cartoon character pins. Holding a small teddy bear and a blood type chart. Tender caring expression — every donation she processes saves a child.

characters.name: 하준석
characters.title: 혈액제제 전문약사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood product pharmacist, early 40s. Meticulous with encyclopedic knowledge. Wire-rimmed glasses, graying temples. Thoughtful dark eyes. White pharmacist coat in a sterile lab. Checking plasma fraction labels against a manifest. Careful precise expression — one mislabel could be fatal.

characters.name: 노예린
characters.title: 수혈의학 전문의
characters.prompt: Female Korean transfusion medicine specialist, late 30s. Brilliant, intense researcher. Dark hair pinned up messily with a pen stuck in it. Fierce intelligent eyes behind stylish frames. White coat covered in sticky notes. Surrounded by research papers and blood compatibility charts. Passionate driven expression — she's close to a breakthrough.

characters.name: 손대원
characters.title: 적십자 지부장
characters.prompt: Male Korean Red Cross chapter director, mid-50s. Dignified career humanitarian. Full grey hair, distinguished. Warm authoritative brown eyes. Dark suit with Red Cross lapel pin. Standing behind a podium with microphones. Hands gesturing calmly. Statesman-like presence — trusted by the public, hiding growing concerns.

characters.name: 루시앙 드보로
characters.title: 카르테인 문서위조사
characters.prompt: Male French document forger, appears 40s. Elegant criminal with artist's hands. Wavy dark hair with grey at temples. Shrewd dark eyes with laugh lines. Tweed jacket with ink-stained fingers. Examining a document with a magnifying glass and fountain pen. Satisfied craftsman's expression — his forgeries are indistinguishable from originals.

characters.name: 클라라 엥겔
characters.title: 카르테인 의사
characters.prompt: Female Austrian doctor working for the family, appears 30s. Cold clinical beauty. Platinum hair pulled back tight. Pale grey eyes with surgical precision gaze. Pristine white coat, black gloves instead of standard blue. Holding a syringe with practiced ease. Emotionless professional expression — she treats the family's unique medical needs.

characters.name: 마르쿠스 베일
characters.title: 새벽의 사냥꾼
characters.prompt: Male American operative, appears 30s. Dangerous and precise. Close-cropped dark hair, strong jaw with stubble. Cold hazel-green eyes. Black tactical clothing with dark overcoat. One gloved hand adjusting an earpiece. Standing in shadow, half-lit. Predator's stillness — he handles problems that require permanent solutions.

characters.name: 비비엔 라크로아
characters.title: 가문 사교계 대리인
characters.prompt: Female French socialite proxy, appears late 20s. Dazzling high-society manipulator. Honey-blonde waves styled impeccably. Sparkling amber eyes. Stunning red evening gown with diamond choker. Champagne flute in hand. Radiant infectious laughter frozen in frame. Expression of dangerous charm — she opens doors the family can't be seen entering.

characters.name: 니콜라이 프로스트
characters.title: 동유럽 혈액 밀수업자
characters.prompt: Male Russian smuggler, appears 40s. Built like a bear, cold as ice. Thick dark hair, heavy brow. Piercing pale blue eyes. Fur-collared dark coat over a tactical vest. Breath visible in cold air. Carrying a reinforced cooler case with biohazard markings. Grim expression — he moves product across borders where no one asks questions.

characters.name: 이지원
characters.title: 심야 콜센터 상담원
characters.prompt: Female Korean late-night call center operator, mid-25s. Exhausted but empathetic. Dark hair with headband, bags under eyes. Soft dark eyes. Wearing a hoodie with a headset microphone. Multiple sticky notes on her monitor. Cup noodle on desk. Tired compassionate expression — she takes the strange 3 AM calls about missing blood shipments.

characters.name: 박상우
characters.title: 건물 경비 아저씨
characters.prompt: Male Korean elderly building security guard, early 60s. Sleepy but surprisingly perceptive. White hair, round friendly face. Droopy kind eyes. Dark navy guard uniform, slightly too big. Small TV playing drama at his desk. Reading glasses on nose. Grandfatherly expression — he pretends to sleep but hears every footstep.

characters.name: 황다인
characters.title: 장례식장 직원
characters.prompt: Female Korean funeral home worker, late 20s. Quiet, composed woman comfortable with death. Straight black hair, pale skin. Calm dark eyes with an ancient patience. Simple black dress with white collar. Arranging chrysanthemum flowers. Serene expression — she notices when bodies arrive with unusual marks on their necks.

characters.name: 진혁수
characters.title: 새벽 청소부
characters.prompt: Male Korean dawn janitor, mid-50s. Invisible man who cleans everything. Thin grey hair under a cap. Tired but watchful dark eyes. Grey-green janitorial uniform with a mop and cleaning cart. Keys jingling on belt. Quiet resigned expression — he cleans up what others don't want to see.

characters.name: 윤소은
characters.title: 동물병원 수의사
characters.prompt: Female Korean veterinarian, early 30s. Warm animal lover with unusual expertise. Wavy brown hair. Bright warm brown eyes. Light green scrubs with animal hair on them. Stethoscope and a small cat in her arms. Curious cheerful expression — she was first to notice the strange blood orders from the center weren't for human use.

characters.name: 곽진호
characters.title: 구급대원
characters.prompt: Male Korean paramedic, early 30s. Action hero in orange. Athletic build, tanned skin. Determined dark eyes. Orange paramedic uniform with reflective strips. Medical bag over shoulder, radio crackling. Running towards camera. Intense urgent expression — he saves lives and asks questions later, but the blood supply issues are getting harder to ignore.

characters.name: 신해나
characters.title: 보건소장
characters.prompt: Female Korean public health center director, mid-40s. Bureaucrat with a conscience. Neat dark hair with grey streaks. Tired but determined dark eyes. Conservative beige blazer with government ID. Stack of public health reports under arm. Reading glasses in hand. Conflicted expression — the numbers from the blood center don't add up.

characters.name: 문시완
characters.title: 불법 장기매매 브로커
characters.prompt: Male Korean black market broker, late 30s. Slippery, well-connected criminal. Dyed dark hair slicked back. Shifty dark eyes behind tinted glasses. Expensive but flashy suit, gold watch. Multiple burner phones. Leaning forward conspiratorially. Oily smile — he deals in organs and blood on the side, and the Kartein orders are his biggest client.

characters.name: 오혜진
characters.title: 바이오테크 연구원
characters.prompt: Female Korean biotech researcher, late 20s. Ambitious scientist chasing a Nobel prize. Dark hair tied back, intense expression. Bright excited dark eyes. White lab coat with biotech company logo. Holding a centrifuge tube with glowing solution. Surrounded by advanced equipment. Ecstatic expression — she's discovered something in the blood samples that shouldn't exist.

characters.name: 강태호 교수
characters.title: 혈액학 석학
characters.prompt: Male Korean elderly hematology professor, late 60s. World-renowned academic. Thick grey hair, bushy eyebrows. Deep thoughtful dark eyes behind thick glasses. Tweed jacket with elbow patches, bow tie. Surrounded by books and research papers in a cluttered office. Contemplative expression — his lifetime of blood research led him to a terrifying hypothesis.

characters.name: 첸 메이린
characters.title: 인터폴 수사관
characters.prompt: Female Chinese Interpol agent, mid-35s. Elite international investigator. Sleek black hair in a low bun. Sharp dark eyes with absolute focus. Dark pantsuit with Interpol badge on belt. Tablet showing international blood trafficking network map. Earpiece in one ear. Cool confident expression — she's been tracking the Kartein family across three continents.

characters.name: 솔로몬 박사
characters.title: WHO 특별조사관
characters.prompt: Male African-American WHO special investigator, 50s. Commanding presence, brilliant mind. Close-cropped grey hair, goatee. Penetrating dark brown eyes. Dark blue suit with WHO pin and diplomatic credentials. Carrying a classified dossier. Standing in front of a world map with red pins. Grave authoritative expression — he knows about the anomalies in global blood supply data.

characters.name: 유한솔
characters.title: 센터 청소 담당
characters.prompt: Male Korean young center janitor, early 20s. College dropout working night shifts. Messy brown hair under a backwards cap. Tired but curious dark eyes. Grey janitorial uniform with earbuds cord visible. Pushing a cleaning cart past a restricted area. Glancing over shoulder with wide eyes — he just saw something he shouldn't have.

characters.name: 구미경
characters.title: 급식 영양사
characters.prompt: Female Korean center nutritionist/cook, mid-40s. Warm motherly woman who feeds everyone. Round face, permed dark hair under a hair net. Smiling crescent eyes. White food service uniform and apron. Ladling soup in the center cafeteria. Warm nurturing expression — she makes special iron-rich meals for donors and notices who eats too much rare steak.

characters.name: 변태호
characters.title: 의료장비 엔지니어
characters.prompt: Male Korean medical equipment engineer, mid-35s. Tech genius who keeps machines alive. Messy hair, dark circles. Sharp eyes behind safety goggles on forehead. Blue work shirt with tool pouches. Repairing a blood centrifuge with a soldering iron. Focused expression — he modified the machines to run faster at night but doesn't know why he was asked to.

characters.name: 우지현
characters.title: 헌혈증서 관리자
characters.prompt: Female Korean donation certificate administrator, late 20s. Ultra-organized paper trail keeper. Neat dark hair with a pencil tucked behind ear. Focused dark eyes scanning documents. White blouse with center lanyard, surrounded by filing cabinets. Stamping a certificate with official seal. Precise expression — she noticed the donation records don't match the blood inventory.

characters.name: 구재민
characters.title: 혈액 배양 연구원
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood culture researcher, early 30s. Obsessive scientist pushing boundaries. Pale skin, dark messy hair. Wide intense dark eyes. Lab coat stained with culture medium. Multiple petri dishes of blood cultures growing strange patterns. Excited but unsettled expression — his cultures are behaving in ways that defy medical science.

characters.name: 지수연
characters.title: 의료윤리 위원
characters.prompt: Female Korean medical ethics committee member, late 40s. Principled intellectual warrior. Silver-streaked dark hair in an elegant low bun. Piercing judgmental dark eyes. Dark academia blazer with brooch, stack of ethics review documents. Arms crossed. Stern righteous expression — she suspects the center is violating every bioethics protocol.

characters.name: 프리드리히 폰 카르테인
characters.title: 가문 원로
characters.prompt: Male ancient European family elder, appears 70s but impossibly vital. The oldest living Kartein. Long white hair tied back aristocratically. Ancient, knowing pale blue eyes that have seen centuries. Dark Victorian-era suit coat with a walking cane topped with a silver wolf head. Antique signet ring. Seated in a wing chair. Expression of infinite patience and quiet menace.

characters.name: 헬레나 미렌
characters.title: 가문 역사학자
characters.prompt: Female British family historian, appears 40s. Bookish woman surrounded by centuries of records. Auburn hair with streaks of premature grey. Intense green eyes. Dark wool cardigan, reading lamp glow. Surrounded by ancient leather-bound books and family trees. Quill pen in hand. Fascinated scholarly expression — she documents the family lineage going back impossibly far.

characters.name: 라파엘 코르테즈
characters.title: 남미 혈액 루트 관리자
characters.prompt: Male Latin American route manager, appears 30s. Charming with deadly edges. Dark wavy hair, tanned skin. Warm but calculating brown eyes. Linen shirt rolled at sleeves, expensive watch. Leaning on a railing overlooking a dock. Easy smile — he manages the South American blood supply route with charm and occasional violence.

characters.name: 유키 타나카
characters.title: 도쿄 연락책
characters.prompt: Female Japanese liaison in Tokyo, appears mid-20s. Ultra-modern and efficient. Straight black hair with blunt bangs. Dark sharp eyes with subtle eyeliner. Sleek black business dress with minimalist jewelry. Tablet and bluetooth earpiece. Standing in neon-lit Tokyo street. Cool composed expression — she coordinates East Asian blood logistics with surgical precision.

characters.name: 그레고르 일린
characters.title: 혈액 보존 과학자
characters.prompt: Male Russian blood preservation scientist, appears 50s. Mad genius working in a frozen lab. Wild grey hair, thick eyebrows. Manic bright blue eyes. Stained lab coat over a cable-knit sweater. Surrounded by cryogenic equipment and blood storage vats. Excited gesturing. Wildly enthusiastic expression — he's perfected blood preservation methods that mainstream science says are impossible.

characters.name: 실비 르나르
characters.title: 카르테인 법률 고문
characters.prompt: Female French legal advisor, appears late 30s. Razor-sharp legal mind. Dark hair in a sleek low chignon. Cold intelligent brown eyes. Charcoal Chanel suit with pearl brooch. Reading legal documents with a red pen for annotations. Leather briefcase at her side. Calculating expression — she's buried evidence in seven countries and never lost a case.

characters.name: 김태양
characters.title: 헌혈버스 운전기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood donation bus driver, early 40s. Cheerful road warrior. Tanned face from driving, crinkled smile. Short black hair with a blood center cap. Bright friendly dark eyes. Blue driver's uniform with rolled-up sleeves. Leaning out of bus window with a wave. Big genuine smile — he drives the mobile unit to festivals and schools.

characters.name: 최예린
characters.title: 성분헌혈 전문 간호사
characters.prompt: Female Korean apheresis nurse, mid-25s. Patient and gentle. Soft dark hair in a side ponytail. Calm reassuring dark eyes. White nurse uniform with special apheresis certification badge. Adjusting an apheresis machine line carefully. Soothing gentle expression — donors always request her by name.

characters.name: 박우진
characters.title: 혈액 데이터 분석가
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood data analyst, late 20s. Numbers nerd with a talent for patterns. Black hair, pale complexion. Observant dark eyes behind large-frame glasses. Casual button shirt with sleeves rolled. Multiple monitors with blood supply dashboards and trend graphs. One hand on chin. Contemplative expression — the data shows anomalies he can't explain.

characters.name: 임채영
characters.title: 환자 상담 간호사
characters.prompt: Female Korean patient counseling nurse, early 30s. Deep empathy and emotional strength. Shoulder-length dark hair. Warm caring brown eyes that look slightly red from held-back tears. Pastel blue scrubs, tissues box on desk. Sitting across from an empty chair in a counseling room. Compassionate expression — she helps patients who need rare blood types that keep disappearing.

characters.name: 송준혁
characters.title: 센터 법무 담당
characters.prompt: Male Korean center legal officer, mid-35s. Cautious lawyer protecting the center. Neatly styled dark hair. Worried dark eyes. Navy suit with center ID badge. Reviewing contracts and compliance documents. Pen tapping nervously. Anxious expression — the legal gray areas are getting darker and he's running out of excuses.

characters.name: 강은비
characters.title: 혈액형 유전학 연구원
characters.prompt: Female Korean blood type genetics researcher, early 30s. Passionate geneticist. Dark hair in a messy bun with multiple hair clips. Excited wide dark eyes. Lab coat with DNA helix pin. Pointing at a genetic sequence display showing impossible markers. Astonished expression — she found a blood type that doesn't exist in any database.

characters.name: 임동규 국장
characters.title: 질병관리청 혈액안전과장
characters.prompt: Male Korean CDC blood safety division director, late 50s. Powerful bureaucrat with a dark secret. Distinguished grey hair. Deep-set dark eyes hiding guilt. Expensive dark suit with government pin. In a corner office with city view. Holding a confidential report stamped 'classified'. Troubled expression — he's been covering up the blood anomalies for years because the order came from above.

characters.name: 엘레나 바스케스
characters.title: 멕시코시티 연결책
characters.prompt: Female Mexican city contact, appears mid-25s. Street-smart with hidden depth. Dark curly hair with colorful hair ties. Warm dark brown eyes with a guarded look. Casual denim jacket with folk-art patches. Silver thumb rings. Leaning against a colorful mural wall. Defiant but kind expression — she recruits donors from the barrios and doesn't ask what the blood is really for.

characters.name: 윌리엄 애쉬포드
characters.title: 런던 사무소장
characters.prompt: Male British London office head, appears 50s. Old-money gentleman. Silver hair combed back perfectly. Cool grey eyes. Pinstripe suit with pocket watch chain. Sitting in a wood-paneled office with oil paintings. Cup of tea on desk. Reserved proper expression — he's managed the London blood distribution for decades under the guise of a charity foundation.

characters.name: 메이 싱
characters.title: 상하이 물류관
characters.prompt: Female Chinese logistics officer in Shanghai, appears early 30s. Efficient and ambitious. Straight black hair in a sharp bob. Dark calculated eyes. Modern qipao-inspired business dress in deep red. Smartphone showing shipping container tracking. Standing on a high-rise balcony overlooking the port. Ambitious expression — she routes blood shipments through legitimate pharmaceutical channels.

characters.name: 헨드릭 카이저
characters.title: 함부르크 항구 관리관
characters.prompt: Male German port authority liaison in Hamburg, appears 40s. Corrupt customs man. Thick brown hair, ruddy face. Small shrewd blue eyes. Dark overcoat with customs authority badge. Standing at docks with clipboard, stamping shipping manifests. Sly expression — he waves through Kartein's refrigerated containers without inspection for a generous monthly fee.

characters.name: 카타리나 노바크
characters.title: 프라하 기록 보관소장
characters.prompt: Female Czech archive keeper in Prague, appears 40s. Guardian of ancient secrets. Dark red hair with streaks of silver. Deep knowing green eyes. Victorian-style high-collar blouse with cameo. Surrounded by ancient leather-bound records in a candlelit vault. Holding an illuminated manuscript. Mysterious expression — she protects records dating back to the 14th century.

characters.name: 단테 모레티
characters.title: 이탈리아 와인 상인 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Italian wine merchant cover, appears 40s. Charming front man for blood operations. Dark curly hair, olive skin. Warm charismatic brown eyes. Expensive Italian suit with a silk pocket square. Wine cellar background with special 'reserve' section behind a locked gate. Holding a wine bottle with an unusual vintage label. Knowing wink — his 'wine' exports carry something else entirely.

characters.name: 이정훈
characters.title: 심야 라디오 DJ
characters.prompt: Male Korean late-night radio DJ, early 30s. Smooth-voiced observer of the night. Wavy dark hair, five o'clock shadow. Warm sleepy dark eyes. Casual knit sweater with headphones around neck. In a cozy radio booth with mic and turntable. Leaning close to mic. Intimate expression — his listeners call in with strange stories about the blood center neighborhood.

characters.name: 양소희
characters.title: 독립 다큐멘터리 감독
characters.prompt: Female Korean indie documentary filmmaker, late 20s. Persistent truth-seeker. Messy dark hair with bandana. Intense dark eyes. Cargo jacket full of pockets. Handheld camera in one hand, boom mic in other. Crouching behind a bush. Determined fearless expression — she's filming a doc about the blood industry and keeps finding locked doors.

characters.name: 노민규
characters.title: 의료 폐기물 처리업자
characters.prompt: Male Korean medical waste disposal worker, mid-45s. Tough man doing a dirty job. Buzz cut with a thick neck. Hard dark eyes. Orange hazmat coveralls with waste disposal company logo. Heavy gloves, carrying sealed biohazard bins. Grim expression — the waste from the blood center weighs more than it should and he's stopped asking why.

characters.name: 차은서
characters.title: 간호대학 교수
characters.prompt: Female Korean nursing professor, early 50s. Respected educator with growing suspicion. Neat grey-streaked hair. Wise sharp dark eyes behind bifocals. Professional pantsuit with university pin. Holding a thick medical textbook. Stern thoughtful expression — her students at the blood center internship are reporting things that contradict everything she taught them.

characters.name: 정시현
characters.title: 소방관
characters.prompt: Male Korean firefighter, late 20s. Athletic hero next door. Short dark hair, strong jaw. Brave earnest dark eyes. Red fire station jacket unzipped over dark T-shirt. Helmet under one arm. Confident stance. Noble determined expression — he responded to a false alarm at the center at 4 AM and saw people he shouldn't have.

characters.name: 허지연
characters.title: 국세청 조사관
characters.prompt: Female Korean tax investigator, mid-35s. Numbers hunter following the money. Dark hair pulled back severely. Sharp penetrating dark eyes. Grey business suit with tax authority badge. Laptop showing financial discrepancies. Stack of receipt ledgers. Focused relentless expression — the center's financial records show income from sources that don't exist on paper.

characters.name: 왕천웨이
characters.title: 중국계 한의사
characters.prompt: Male Chinese-Korean traditional medicine doctor, early 60s. Ancient wisdom meets modern suspicion. Long grey goatee. Deep calm dark eyes. Traditional han-yi coat over modern clothes. Herb cabinet behind him. Holding pulse-reading fingers up. Serene but disturbed expression — he read a patient's pulse and felt something he'd only read about in 500-year-old texts.

characters.name: 박지민
characters.title: 법의간호학 전문가
characters.prompt: Female Korean forensic nursing expert, mid-35s. Clinical detective. Dark hair in a tight bun. Analytical dark eyes behind frameless glasses. White forensic coat with evidence camera around neck. Examining unusual puncture marks on a photo under magnification. Disturbed but professional expression — the wound patterns she's documenting are not from any standard medical equipment.

characters.name: 김하준
characters.title: 국방부 생물무기 분석관
characters.prompt: Male Korean military bioweapon analyst, early 40s. Cold, classified man. Military-short black hair. Unreadable dark eyes. Military dress shirt with no visible rank insignia. Classified folder with biohazard seal. Secure facility background. Stern blank expression — the blood samples forwarded from the center triggered a bioweapon detection protocol.

characters.name: 레이첼 윈터스
characters.title: CIA 비공식 연락관
characters.prompt: Female American CIA unofficial liaison, early 40s. Power behind diplomacy. Sandy blonde hair in professional waves. Penetrating blue-grey eyes. Tailored navy blazer with American flag pin, barely visible. Encrypted phone to her ear. Embassy hallway background. Controlled neutral expression — the Agency has been monitoring the Kartein network for decades and she just got authorization to intervene.

characters.name: 한도경
characters.title: 응급실 수간호사
characters.prompt: Female Korean ER head nurse, mid-40s. Iron backbone, gentle hands. Grey-streaked dark hair under nurse cap. Steady determined dark eyes. Blue scrubs with senior nurse badge. Directing staff with pointed finger. Commanding but kind expression — 20 years in ER taught her that blood shortages kill, so she doesn't question the center's night deliveries.

characters.name: 신경호
characters.title: 혈액 운반 드론 개발자
characters.prompt: Male Korean drone developer for blood transport, mid-25s. Tech startup energy. Messy dark hair, youthful face. Excited bright dark eyes. Casual t-shirt with tech company hoodie. Holding a delivery drone prototype with blood-bag-sized compartment. Workshop background with drone parts. Enthusiastic expression — his drones could deliver blood anywhere in 30 minutes, but someone wants them to fly at night only.

characters.name: 독고유나
characters.title: 병원 사회서비스 팀장
characters.prompt: Female Korean hospital social services team lead, early 40s. Advocate for vulnerable patients. Dark hair with warm highlights. Compassionate but firm dark eyes. Cardigan over professional blouse with hospital badge. Case folders in arm, phone pressed to ear. Multi-tasking expression — she fights for patients who need blood but keeps hitting unexplained shortages.

characters.name: 조인혁
characters.title: 수혈 부작용 전문의
characters.prompt: Male Korean transfusion reaction specialist, late 40s. Careful investigator of anomalies. Neat grey-touched hair. Troubled dark eyes with deep concentration. White coat with immune-hematology lab. Staring at a reaction test result that shows impossible compatibility patterns. Deeply puzzled expression — patients are reacting to blood that should be perfectly compatible.

characters.name: 여해원
characters.title: 비밀 지하연구실 실장
characters.prompt: Female Korean secret underground lab director, mid-40s. The woman who knows the truth. Dark hair with a distinctive white streak. Intense dark eyes with dark circles. Lab coat over casual clothes, security keycard on retractable lanyard. Standing in a hidden lab beneath the center with advanced biotechnology equipment. Expression of someone carrying a terrible burden — she's been synthesizing the Kartein family's blood substitute in secret.

characters.name: 이반 페트로프
characters.title: 모스크바 지부 수장
characters.prompt: Male Russian Moscow branch head, appears 40s. Imposing oligarch-type. Thick dark hair with sharp widow's peak. Cold steel-blue eyes. Expensive dark overcoat with fur collar. Gold ring on pinky finger. Moscow nightscape behind him. Imperious expression — he controls blood distribution across all of Russia and answers only to the Kartein elders.

characters.name: 소피아 알메이다
characters.title: 리스본 병원 내부자
characters.prompt: Female Portuguese hospital insider in Lisbon, appears 30s. Discreet and melancholic. Long dark wavy hair. Sad beautiful dark eyes. Hospital administrator uniform. Standing by a window overlooking old Lisbon streets at dusk. Holding a blood inventory report she's about to alter. Conflicted expression — she diverts blood supplies to the Kartein network and hates herself for it.

characters.name: 제임스 블랙우드
characters.title: 카르테인 디지털 보안관
characters.prompt: Male British-Caribbean digital security chief, appears early 30s. Cyber warfare specialist. Short locs, sharp intelligent dark brown eyes. Black turtleneck with dark glasses pushed up on head. Triple-monitor setup showing encrypted communications. Mechanical keyboard. Cool focused expression — he ensures Kartein's digital footprint is invisible across all networks.

characters.name: 아그네스 린드퀴스트
characters.title: 스톡홀름 혈액 연구소장
characters.prompt: Female Swedish blood research lab director, appears 50s. Stern Nordic scientist. Ash blonde hair in a severe bun. Pale blue eyes. Minimalist white lab in a glass-walled Scandinavian facility. Crisp white coat. Holding a vial of perfectly preserved centuries-old blood sample. Clinical detached expression — she pushes the boundaries of blood science using methods no ethics board would approve.

characters.name: 한석현
characters.title: 대한적십자사 감찰관
characters.prompt: Male Korean Red Cross inspector, mid-45s. Duty-bound watchdog. Conservative dark hair with side part. Stern sharp dark eyes. Dark suit with Red Cross inspector badge. Clipboard with violation report. Standing at the entrance of the blood center. Uncompromising expression — his quarterly inspection keeps finding minor violations that distract from the major ones he can't quite prove.

characters.name: 나예진
characters.title: 피해자 가족 대표
characters.prompt: Female Korean victim's family representative, mid-35s. Grief transformed into crusade. Dark hair, no makeup, hollow eyes from sleepless nights. Dark circles but fierce determined gaze. Simple black clothes, holding a photo of her missing sister. Standing outside the blood center gates. Raw desperate expression — her sister donated blood and was never seen again.

characters.name: 피셔 대사
characters.title: 주한 오스트리아 대사
characters.prompt: Male Austrian ambassador to Korea, late 50s. Diplomat with hidden loyalties. Silver hair parted perfectly. Cultured grey-blue eyes. Formal diplomatic suit with Austrian flag pin and embassy backdrop. Wine glass at a reception. Polished diplomatic smile — he facilitates the Kartein family's Korean operations under diplomatic immunity but is having second thoughts.

characters.name: 구무당
characters.title: 무속인
characters.prompt: Female Korean elderly shaman/mudang, 70s. Ancient spiritual sight. Wild grey hair with colorful cloth headband. Milky eyes that seem to see through reality. Traditional colorful hanbok-inspired shamanic dress with tassels and bells. Ritual fan in one hand, spirit bell in other. Intense prophetic expression — she sensed 'the old blood-drinkers' returned to Korea before anyone else knew.

characters.name: 박총경
characters.title: 서울경찰청 수사본부장
characters.prompt: Male Korean police commissioner, mid-50s. Top cop torn between justice and orders. Commanding grey-streaked hair. Hard dark eyes with moral conflict. Full police dress uniform with medals and commissioner insignia. Standing before a case board connecting blood centers, missing persons, and diplomatic vehicles. Tormented expression — he has the evidence but the order to stand down came from the Blue House.

characters.name: 윤시환
characters.title: 센터 전산실장
characters.prompt: Male Korean center IT room manager, early 40s. Quiet sysadmin who sees all the data. Thin frame, pale skin from office life. Short black hair with premature grey patches. Tired but alert dark eyes behind thick-framed glasses. Rumpled polo shirt with center lanyard, surrounded by server racks with blinking LEDs. Holding a network cable with a concerned look — the server logs show massive data transfers at 2 AM every night.

characters.name: 마지영
characters.title: 센터 심리상담사
characters.prompt: Female Korean center counselor, early 30s. Empathetic listener with a calming presence. Soft shoulder-length brown hair with gentle waves. Warm chestnut eyes radiating patience. Cream-colored cardigan over a lavender blouse, center badge on a fabric lanyard. Sitting in a cozy counseling room with tissue box and soft lamp. Gentle attentive expression — donors confide fears to her, and lately the fears are getting stranger.

characters.name: 노건우
characters.title: 시설 경비 팀장
characters.prompt: Male Korean center security team leader, mid-40s. Ex-military turned head of security. Broad-shouldered with a crew cut. Stern watchful dark eyes with crow's feet. Dark navy security uniform with radio on shoulder, master keyring on belt. Standing at a CCTV monitoring station with multiple screens. Arms crossed, jaw set tight — he was ordered to disable cameras in B2 corridor every night and wants to know why.

characters.name: 송아름
characters.title: 헌혈카페 바리스타
characters.prompt: Female Korean blood donation cafe barista, early 20s. Bubbly part-timer making coffee for donors. Dyed caramel-brown hair in twin buns. Sparkly dark eyes with glitter eyeshadow. Red apron with blood-drop mascot logo over a white T-shirt. Frothing milk with one hand, balancing a tray of iron-supplement cookies with the other. Bright cheerful grin — she gives extra cookies to donors who look pale.

characters.name: 전상철
characters.title: 혈액 수급 기획관
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood supply planner, late 40s. Stressed logistics brain behind the center. Thinning dark hair combed over, deep forehead wrinkles. Worried dark eyes scanning spreadsheets. White dress shirt with sleeves rolled, loosened red tie. Dual monitors showing supply-demand graphs with alarming red zones. Rubbing his temples — the demand numbers from VIP clients don't match any hospital records.

characters.name: 임소연
characters.title: 센터 홍보팀 디자이너
characters.prompt: Female Korean center PR team graphic designer, mid-20s. Creative millennial with an eye for detail. Short pixie-cut dark hair with an undercut. Bright curious dark eyes. Oversized denim jacket over a striped shirt, drawing tablet and stylus pen in hand. Designing a blood donation poster on her screen. Playful concentrated expression — she accidentally found classified documents on the shared drive while looking for stock photos.

characters.name: 배승현
characters.title: 혈액검사 자동화 기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood testing automation technician, early 30s. Quiet robotics whiz. Neat black hair, lean build. Focused dark eyes with the glow of LED indicators reflected. Dark blue technician jumpsuit with anti-static wristband. Calibrating an automated blood screening machine with micro-tools. Intense precision expression — the machine flagged blood samples with properties his software wasn't programmed to detect.

characters.name: 길혜정
characters.title: 센터 총무과장
characters.prompt: Female Korean center general affairs manager, late 40s. Meticulous administrator who controls every budget line. Permed dark hair, rectangular glasses. Sharp assessing dark eyes. Beige blazer with a center name tag, calculator and ledger on desk. Reviewing expense reports with a red pen. Suspicious frown — the utility bills for the underground floors are ten times higher than they should be.

characters.name: 권동희
characters.title: 혈액 폐기 감독관
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood disposal supervisor, mid-50s. Grim rule-follower haunted by what he's seen. Grey buzzcut, deep lines on face. Haunted dark eyes. White coat with biohazard certification badge. Standing beside a sealed medical incinerator. Holding a manifest listing expired blood units — but the numbers never match what actually gets destroyed. Troubled weary expression.

characters.name: 서유나
characters.title: 분자진단 전문의
characters.prompt: Female Korean molecular diagnostics specialist, mid-30s. Brilliant scientist with an unshakeable poker face. Sleek dark hair pulled back with a claw clip. Calm analytical dark eyes. Sterile white coat in a high-tech PCR lab. Examining a DNA amplification result on a glowing screen. One eyebrow raised — the genetic markers in certain blood samples contain sequences that don't exist in any known human genome.

characters.name: 레오폴트 슈트라우스
characters.title: 미술품 딜러 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Austrian art dealer cover, appears late 50s. Cultured gentleman with impeccable taste. Silver hair swept back, distinguished mustache. Warm but calculating hazel eyes. Velvet burgundy smoking jacket with ascot tie. Holding an antique painting frame, examining brushwork with a loupe. Gallery background with old masters. Connoisseur's satisfied expression — his art shipments contain temperature-controlled compartments that aren't for paintings.

characters.name: 사나 오카포
characters.title: 나이지리아 현지 연락원
characters.prompt: Female Nigerian field contact, appears mid-20s. Charismatic with natural authority. Rich dark skin, close-cropped natural hair with gold ear cuffs. Bright intelligent dark brown eyes. Stylish ankara-print blazer over a white silk top. Gold bracelet and smartphone in hand. Standing before a Lagos skyline at dusk. Confident commanding expression — she manages West African blood procurement through a network of legitimate clinics.

characters.name: 필리프 뒤랑
characters.title: 프랑스 사립은행 지점장
characters.prompt: Male French private banker, appears 40s. Elegant financier who launders fortunes. Perfectly styled dark brown hair with silver temples. Cool grey-green eyes. Bespoke navy suit with Hermes tie and platinum cufflinks. Sitting in a mahogany-paneled office with oil painting behind him. Reviewing account statements with a Mont Blanc pen. Composed expression — he manages the Kartein family's financial network across twelve shell companies.

characters.name: 프리야 샤르마
characters.title: 뭄바이 제약 연결책
characters.prompt: Female Indian pharmaceutical liaison in Mumbai, appears early 30s. Sharp businesswoman navigating two worlds. Long dark hair in a sleek low ponytail with jasmine flower. Intense dark brown eyes with kohl liner. Tailored emerald green salwar kameez with gold earrings. Tablet showing pharmaceutical distribution charts. Standing in a modern Mumbai office with city lights behind her. Ambitious shrewd expression — she moves blood products through India's pharma supply chain undetected.

characters.name: 하산 알 라시드
characters.title: 두바이 물류 총괄
characters.prompt: Male Emirati logistics director in Dubai, appears late 40s. Refined desert aristocrat. Neatly trimmed black beard with silver threads. Deep dark eyes with quiet authority. Pristine white thobe with gold-trimmed bisht. Standing before floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Dubai's port at night. Gold watch, encrypted phone in hand. Calm powerful expression — he controls the Middle Eastern distribution hub and no shipment moves without his seal.

characters.name: 잉그리드 판데르베르흐
characters.title: 카르테인 클래식 피아니스트
characters.prompt: Female Dutch classical pianist, appears late 30s. Ethereal musician with haunting talent. Long straight strawberry-blonde hair falling over one shoulder. Pale green eyes with a distant melancholy. Flowing black concert gown with a single pearl pendant. Seated at a grand piano, long elegant fingers resting on ivory keys. Wistful expression — she performs at Kartein galas and her music masks the sounds from the private rooms below.

characters.name: 타케시 쿠로사와
characters.title: 오사카 비밀 경매 운영자
characters.prompt: Male Japanese secret auction operator in Osaka, appears 50s. Immaculate traditional aesthete. Silver-streaked black hair in a neat topknot. Sharp dark eyes with absolute composure. Black silk kimono-inspired jacket over modern tailored pants. Holding a ceremonial gavel made of dark wood. Traditional Japanese auction house background with screens. Inscrutable expression — he auctions rare blood types to the highest Kartein bidder in ceremonies disguised as art sales.

characters.name: 발렌티나 로시
characters.title: 밀라노 패션 디자이너 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Italian fashion designer cover in Milan, appears early 40s. Stunning creative genius with a dark side. Dramatic dark curly hair with a white streak. Fierce dark brown eyes with dramatic winged liner. Black tailored blazer with oversized red silk scarf, measuring tape draped around neck. Fashion atelier background with dress forms. Holding design sketches with hidden compartment blueprints underneath. Passionate artistic expression — her fashion shows are fronts for Kartein gatherings.

characters.name: 에릭 마그누손
characters.title: 카르테인 혈액 운송선 선장
characters.prompt: Male Norwegian cargo ship captain, appears late 40s. Weathered seafarer with ice in his veins. Thick sandy-blonde beard, wind-burned face. Piercing light blue eyes. Dark navy peacoat with gold captain's buttons over a cable-knit sweater. Gripping a ship's wheel. North Sea storm in the background. Stoic fearless expression — his refrigerated cargo ship crosses the Atlantic monthly carrying containers that customs never opens.

characters.name: 아마라 디알로
characters.title: 세네갈 의료봉사단 위장 책임자
characters.prompt: Female Senegalese medical mission cover operator, appears late 20s. Compassionate facade over cold efficiency. Beautiful dark skin, natural afro styled with a colorful headwrap. Warm but guarded dark brown eyes. White medical volunteer vest over a bright yellow dress. Carrying a medical supply crate. Standing near a mobile clinic in a village setting. Kind but watchful expression — her 'charity missions' in rural Africa are the Kartein's primary blood sourcing operations.

characters.name: 카를로스 멘데스
characters.title: 부에노스아이레스 와인 수출업자 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Argentine wine exporter cover, appears mid-35s. Roguishly handsome with a dangerous edge. Dark wavy hair pushed back, strong stubbled jaw. Warm brown eyes with a predatory glint. Linen shirt open at the collar with a leather cord necklace, sleeves rolled. Leaning on a wooden wine barrel in a candlelit cellar. Charming half-smile — his 'Malbec reserve' shipments to Europe carry blood-filled vials packed between the bottles.

characters.name: 조은영
characters.title: 떡볶이 포장마차 사장
characters.prompt: Female Korean street food vendor, late 50s. Tough neighborhood ajumma who misses nothing. Permed grey-brown hair under a visor. Sharp knowing dark eyes with deep laugh lines. Worn red apron over layered clothing, stirring a huge pot of tteokbokki with a giant ladle. Street food cart with steam rising. Shrewd watchful expression — her cart is across from the blood center and she's been documenting the 3 AM limousines for months.

characters.name: 서한결
characters.title: e스포츠 프로게이머
characters.prompt: Male Korean eSports professional gamer, late teens. Intense digital native with lightning reflexes. Dyed silver-blue hair, sharp features. Focused dark eyes with monitor glow reflected. Team jersey with sponsor logos, gaming headset around neck. Hands hovering over a mechanical keyboard. Competitive determined expression — he was streaming late-night ranked games when his webcam caught shadowy figures on the blood center rooftop.

characters.name: 박미연
characters.title: 웹툰 작가
characters.prompt: Female Korean webtoon artist, mid-25s. Imaginative introvert who draws what she sees. Messy dark hair in a loose side braid with paint stains on her fingers. Wide creative dark brown eyes. Oversized graphic sweater with pen tablet and stylus. Drawing a vampire character on her tablet that looks suspiciously like someone she saw at the center. Dreamy but troubled expression — her fictional horror webtoon keeps accidentally predicting real events.

characters.name: 황태성
characters.title: 택배 기사
characters.prompt: Male Korean delivery driver, early 30s. Hustling worker who delivers everywhere. Short dark hair dampened with sweat, athletic build. Determined tired dark eyes. Brown delivery company uniform with reflective vest, scanner gun on belt. Carrying stacked boxes outside the blood center. Rushed harried expression — he keeps getting routed to deliver unmarked packages to the center's back entrance after midnight.

characters.name: 김수진
characters.title: 꽃집 사장
characters.prompt: Female Korean florist shop owner, early 40s. Gentle soul surrounded by beauty. Soft dark brown hair with a few grey strands tucked behind ear. Warm kind dark eyes. Green gardening apron over a floral blouse, pruning shears in hand. Arranging red roses and white lilies in her shop. Tender but uneasy expression — the mysterious man in the suit orders the same arrangement of deep red flowers every week and always pays cash.

characters.name: 윤태열
characters.title: 태권도 관장
characters.prompt: Male Korean taekwondo master, mid-40s. Disciplined martial artist with a protective instinct. Short-cropped dark hair with silver streaks, strong jaw. Fierce focused dark eyes. White dobok with a black belt and fourth-dan patch, red-and-black chest protector in hand. Standing in a training dojang. Stern protective expression — his students near the blood center started coming to class with mysterious fatigue and he's investigating.

characters.name: 임지은
characters.title: 심야 바텐더
characters.prompt: Female Korean bartender, late 20s. Cool observer behind the bar. Sleek black hair with a deep side part, silver ear piercings. Calm perceptive dark eyes. Black vest over a white dress shirt with rolled sleeves. Polishing a crystal cocktail glass in a dimly lit upscale bar. Slight knowing smirk — the Kartein people drink at her bar every Friday and she's memorized their conversations.

characters.name: 최병관
characters.title: 퇴역 군인
characters.prompt: Male Korean retired soldier, late 60s. Old warrior with unshaken instincts. White close-cropped hair, weathered face with a scar on chin. Hard but weary dark eyes. Olive drab military veteran jacket with campaign medals, walking cane with a brass handle. Sitting on a park bench near the blood center. Vigilant suspicious expression — he served in special operations and recognizes tactical movement patterns in the center's night visitors.

characters.name: 정해원
characters.title: 유치원 교사
characters.prompt: Female Korean kindergarten teacher, late 20s. Warm-hearted educator with innocent eyes. Soft wavy dark hair with a flower hairpin. Bright gentle dark brown eyes. Colorful apron with crayon stains over a pastel dress. Holding children's drawings and a puppet. Sweet nurturing smile — one of her students drew a picture of 'the scary people with red eyes' outside the blood center at night and she doesn't know what to make of it.

characters.name: 남진우
characters.title: 점술가
characters.prompt: Male Korean fortune teller, mid-50s. Mysterious seer with uncanny accuracy. Long grey-streaked dark hair tied in a loose topknot. Deep penetrating dark eyes. Traditional black durumagi coat with jade ring. Sitting behind a divination table with saju charts and a crystal ball. Tarot cards spread before him. Grave prophetic expression — every reading he does about the blood center comes up with the same ominous card: the Tower.

characters.name: 오지민
characters.title: 클럽 DJ
characters.prompt: Female Korean club DJ, early 20s. Electrifying nightlife queen. Neon-streaked black hair in space buns. Bold dark eyes with holographic makeup. Oversized vintage denim jacket covered in pins over a crop top. One hand on DJ turntable, other holding glowing headphones. Behind a DJ booth with laser lights. Electric excited expression — she DJs at the underground club where the Kartein's younger members party and she's noticed they never drink alcohol.

characters.name: 고승준
characters.title: 파쿠르 선수
characters.prompt: Male Korean parkour athlete, early 20s. Fearless urban acrobat. Lean muscular build, sharp angular face. Fierce determined dark eyes. Black compression shirt with chalk-dusted hands, running shoes. Mid-leap on a rooftop with city skyline behind. Intense focused expression — he free-runs the neighborhood at dawn and once vaulted over the blood center's back wall into a loading zone full of unmarked refrigerated trucks.

characters.name: 백순희
characters.title: 한약방 할머니
characters.prompt: Female Korean traditional medicine grandmother, mid-70s. Ancient healer with wisdom passed down generations. White hair in a neat bun with a jade hairpin. Cloudy but shrewd dark eyes. Traditional hanbok in muted indigo with a hemp apron. Grinding herbs with a stone mortar in a cluttered herbal shop. Knowing cryptic expression — she makes a special tonic that neutralizes 'the cold blood sickness' and the Kartein have tried to buy her silence.

characters.name: 권석진
characters.title: 수산시장 상인
characters.prompt: Male Korean fish market merchant, mid-50s. Rough-hewn market veteran who works before dawn. Weathered tanned face, thick calloused hands. Squinting dark eyes with permanent salt-spray wrinkles. Rubber boots, waterproof apron over flannel shirt. Standing at a market stall with ice and fresh fish. Gruff honest expression — he noticed the blood center's trucks using the fish market cold-storage facility after hours and started asking uncomfortable questions.

characters.name: 이나영
characters.title: 도서관 사서
characters.prompt: Female Korean librarian, early 30s. Quiet bookworm with a detective's mind. Straight dark hair parted in the middle, tucked behind both ears. Thoughtful dark eyes behind oval tortoiseshell glasses. Cozy brown cardigan with a library badge, stack of old books in arms. Standing in a dusty archive section. Pensive curious expression — she found 19th-century Joseon-era texts describing 'blood aristocrats from the West' that match the Kartein family exactly.

characters.name: 민준혁
characters.title: 노숙인
characters.prompt: Male Korean homeless man, late 40s. Invisible witness to the night. Gaunt face with unkempt dark grey beard. Haunted but observant dark eyes. Layered worn clothing — army surplus jacket, wool beanie, fingerless gloves. Sitting against a wall near the blood center with a cardboard sign. Hollow resigned expression — the elegant strangers give him money to stay silent about what he sees at night, and the money is always in old European banknotes.

characters.name: 안설희
characters.title: 시민운동가
characters.prompt: Female Korean civic activist, mid-35s. Fierce community organizer demanding transparency. Short choppy dark hair, no makeup. Blazing passionate dark eyes. Worn denim jacket covered in protest pins and ribbons over a black T-shirt. Holding a megaphone and petition documents. Standing before the blood center gates with protest banners. Fiery defiant expression — she's organized a citizens' investigation into the blood center's unaccounted inventory and she won't be silenced.

characters.name: 여동욱
characters.title: 응급구조학과 교수
characters.prompt: Male Korean emergency medicine professor, mid-40s. Academic authority with field experience. Short neat salt-and-pepper hair. Penetrating analytical dark eyes behind steel-framed glasses. White dress shirt with university crest tie. Holding a medical journal with a blood-related article circled in red. Lecture hall background with anatomical charts. Grave concerned expression — his research paper on anomalous transfusion reactions was rejected by every journal and he suspects outside pressure.

characters.name: 몽고메리 클라크
characters.title: 카르테인 경매소 관장
characters.prompt: Male British auction house director, appears 60s. Patrician tastemaker with centuries of experience. Distinguished white hair, aquiline nose. Sharp penetrating blue-grey eyes. Immaculate charcoal morning suit with a gold watch chain and carnation boutonniere. Standing at an antique auction podium with a gavel. Gallery of rare artifacts behind him. Commanding aristocratic expression — his auction house has been a Kartein front since the 18th century, laundering blood trade profits through art sales.

characters.name: 아이샤 벤제마
characters.title: 모로코 외교관 위장
characters.prompt: Female Moroccan diplomat cover, appears mid-35s. Elegant North African beauty operating in high society. Lustrous dark hair under a designer silk headscarf in deep teal. Striking dark eyes with gold flecks. Tailored ivory pantsuit with gold geometric jewelry. Holding a diplomatic portfolio and champagne glass at a reception. Poised graceful expression — she facilitates Kartein blood shipments through North African diplomatic pouches that no customs officer can open.

characters.name: 알렉산드르 볼코프
characters.title: 상트페테르부르크 의학 아카데미장
characters.prompt: Male Russian medical academy director in St. Petersburg, appears late 50s. Imposing intellectual with iron authority. Thick silver hair swept back, prominent brow. Cold piercing grey eyes. Dark academic robes over a formal suit with multiple honorary medals. Standing in a grand marble-columned hall. Arms clasped behind back. Imperious scholarly expression — he runs the Kartein's most advanced blood research program behind the facade of a prestigious medical school.

characters.name: 린 시우잉
characters.title: 홍콩 금융 매니저
characters.prompt: Female Chinese-Hong Kong financial manager, appears early 40s. Ice-cool money handler in the world's most competitive market. Sleek straight black hair in a sharp asymmetric bob. Cold calculated dark eyes. Tailored black Cheongsam-inspired blazer with jade brooch. Standing in a glass-walled office overlooking Victoria Harbour at night. Tablet showing complex financial structures. Unflinching business expression — she manages the Kartein's Asian investment portfolio worth billions in blood-trade laundered money.

characters.name: 오스카 나바로
characters.title: 콜롬비아 개인 의사
characters.prompt: Male Colombian private physician, appears late 30s. Smooth doctor with flexible ethics. Wavy dark hair with a charming streak of grey at the temple. Warm brown eyes with a practiced bedside manner. Crisp white coat over an expensive polo shirt, leather medical bag with gold clasps. Stethoscope casually draped. Easy reassuring smile — he treats the Kartein family's South American members and keeps their unusual blood test results off the record.

characters.name: 나츠키 이시다
characters.title: 교토 다도 마스터 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Japanese tea ceremony master cover in Kyoto, appears 40s. Serene traditionalist hiding ancient connections. Raven-black hair in a perfect shimada-style updo with a lacquer kanzashi. Calm dark eyes with ageless depth. Elegant sage-green kimono with subtle crane pattern, holding a matcha tea whisk. Kneeling in a traditional tearoom. Tranquil meditative expression — her centuries-old teahouse in Kyoto hosts secret Kartein meetings in rooms no tourist ever sees.

characters.name: 데본 라이트
characters.title: 뉴욕 재단법인 이사
characters.prompt: Male African-American foundation director in New York, appears early 40s. Polished power broker in the non-profit world. Clean-shaven with a sharp fade haircut. Intense intelligent dark brown eyes. Tailored charcoal suit with a blood-red pocket square and Yale class ring. Standing in a Manhattan penthouse office with skyline view. Confident charismatic expression — his humanitarian foundation is the Kartein's primary American front, funding blood research that benefits only one family.

characters.name: 에바 코발스키
characters.title: 바르샤바 문화 연락관
characters.prompt: Female Polish cultural liaison in Warsaw, appears late 20s. Artsy intellectual with hidden ruthlessness. Wavy honey-brown hair to shoulders. Observant grey-green eyes. Vintage leather jacket over a black turtleneck with amber pendant. Standing in front of a Warsaw gallery with contemporary art. Holding a gallery catalog. Thoughtful expression with a hint of danger — she networks the Kartein into Eastern European cultural institutions to establish legitimate cover.

characters.name: 한지후
characters.title: 센터 의무기록사
characters.prompt: Male Korean center medical records clerk, late 20s. Detail-oriented data keeper with a photographic memory. Neat short black hair, clean-shaven. Watchful dark eyes behind simple square glasses. White dress shirt with center ID, surrounded by filing cabinets and a computer terminal. Scanning a patient file with a barcode reader. Precise methodical expression — he memorized every donor ID and recently realized some donors have records dating back decades but haven't aged in their photos.

characters.name: 윤소윤
characters.title: 센터 물리치료사
characters.prompt: Female Korean center physical therapist, mid-25s. Caring healer who rehabilitates donors. Athletic build with a warm face. Dark hair in a practical high ponytail. Bright encouraging dark brown eyes. Light blue scrubs with a rehabilitation department badge. Demonstrating arm exercises with a resistance band. Encouraging supportive expression — she treats donors with post-donation complications and noticed some recover impossibly fast while others deteriorate for no medical reason.

characters.name: 하파엘 올리베이라
characters.title: 브라질 혈액은행 연구원
characters.prompt: Male Brazilian blood bank researcher, early 30s. Passionate scientist from Sao Paulo. Curly dark brown hair, warm bronze skin. Bright inquisitive brown eyes. White lab coat with a Brazilian university crest. Holding a centrifuge tube with an unusual separating pattern. Lab background with tropical plants on the windowsill. Excited puzzled expression — he came to Korea on an exchange program and discovered the same impossible blood markers he found in indigenous Brazilian samples.

characters.name: 강희진
characters.title: 야간 대리운전 기사
characters.prompt: Female Korean late-night designated driver, mid-40s. Hardworking single mother who drives all night. Dark hair tied back loosely, tired lines around her mouth. Observant dark eyes that stay sharp even at 4 AM. Practical dark jacket with a 'designated driver' vest, car keys and phone in hand. Standing by a sedan in the blood center parking lot. Weary but alert expression — she drove a drunken Kartein member who mumbled things in an old European language about 'the feeding schedule.'

characters.name: 장민수
characters.title: 건축 감리사
characters.prompt: Male Korean building inspector, early 50s. Meticulous construction authority. Grey-flecked hair under a yellow hard hat. Stern careful dark eyes. Khaki field vest with clipboard and measuring tape. Standing in front of the blood center building with blueprints rolled under one arm. Suspicious frown — the building's official blueprints show three basement levels, but the foundation measurements suggest at least six.

characters.name: 유수아
characters.title: 동물권 활동가
characters.prompt: Female Korean animal rights activist, early 20s. Passionate protester with relentless energy. Short dyed lavender hair with an undercut. Fierce bright dark eyes. Green bomber jacket covered in activist patches, holding a protest sign and a rescued stray kitten. Standing near the blood center loading dock. Angry determined expression — she came to investigate rumored animal testing but stumbled onto something much more disturbing in the center's restricted wing.

characters.name: 코너 머피
characters.title: 아일랜드계 사립탐정
characters.prompt: Male Irish-American private detective, late 40s. Old-school gumshoe hired by a worried family. Red-brown hair streaked with grey, ruddy complexion. Sharp skeptical green eyes. Rumpled tweed coat over a wrinkled shirt with loosened tie. Notepad and pen in hand, cigarette behind ear. Standing outside the blood center in the rain. World-weary but tenacious expression — he was hired to find a missing Irish donor who came to Korea, and every lead points to the blood center.

characters.name: 타나카 유이
characters.title: 일본 후생노동성 조사관
characters.prompt: Female Japanese health ministry investigator, mid-35s. Precise bureaucrat with an iron will. Straight black hair in a neat shoulder-length cut. Stern focused dark eyes. Tailored grey suit with Japanese government ID on a chain. Holding a thick dossier of cross-border blood trade reports. Standing in a conference room with documents spread on a table. Resolute expression — she traced irregular blood shipments from Korea to Osaka and is here for answers the Kartein can't deflect.

characters.name: 하진숙
characters.title: 응급의료 헬기 조종사
characters.prompt: Female Korean emergency medical helicopter pilot, late 30s. Fearless aviator with nerves of steel. Short dark hair, sun-tanned face. Calm confident dark eyes.
