Orange flight suit with aviator sunglasses pushed up on forehead, flight helmet under one arm. Standing beside a medical helicopter on a hospital rooftop. Steady composed expression — she flies blood to remote hospitals and twice her GPS rerouted her to coordinates that don't appear on any map.

characters.name: 윤도영
characters.title: 지하철 야간 정비공
characters.prompt: Male Korean subway night maintenance worker, mid-40s. Blue-collar underground dweller. Stocky build, rough hands. Tired steady dark eyes. Dark blue maintenance coveralls with reflective strips, hard hat with a headlamp. Standing in a dimly lit subway tunnel with tools. Weary but observant expression — he found a sealed door behind a maintenance panel near the blood center station that leads to tunnels not on any transit map.

characters.name: 소피아 페테르센
characters.title: 덴마크 혈액학 박사
characters.prompt: Female Danish hematologist, early 40s. Brilliant Nordic scientist following the evidence. Straight light blonde hair to shoulders. Intense pale blue eyes behind minimalist titanium glasses. White lab coat over a simple navy sweater. Holding a published research paper with sections highlighted in red. Conference presentation background. Troubled scholarly expression — her peer-reviewed paper on regenerative blood properties was retracted under mysterious pressure from an anonymous European foundation.

characters.name: 최태원
characters.title: 혈액원 노조 위원장
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood center union chairman, early 50s. Tough labor advocate with a booming voice. Thick grey-touched hair, square jaw. Fierce righteous dark eyes. Worn navy work jacket with union badge and rolled-up protest banner under arm. Thick glasses, fist raised mid-speech. Passionate defiant expression — he's demanding answers about why night-shift workers are being asked to sign unusual NDAs and receiving hazard pay for duties that aren't officially listed.

characters.name: 엠마 해리슨
characters.title: BBC 탐사보도 PD
characters.prompt: Female British BBC investigative journalist producer, late 30s. Tenacious truth-hunter with global reach. Auburn hair in a practical short cut. Sharp inquisitive green-hazel eyes. Dark field jacket with press credentials visible, professional camera slung over shoulder. Reviewing footage on a laptop in a hotel room with case notes pinned to the wall. Intense focused expression — her documentary about the global blood supply led her to Seoul, and multiple sources have gone silent since she arrived.

characters.name: 앙드레 로랑
characters.title: 카르테인 수석 셰프
characters.prompt: Male French head chef, appears late 48s. Culinary artist serving a very particular clientele. Salt-and-pepper hair under a tall white toque. Knowing dark brown eyes with smile lines. Pristine white double-breasted chef coat with gold buttons. Holding a silver cloche over a beautifully plated dish. Gourmet kitchen background with copper pots. Proud satisfied expression — his 'signature red reduction sauce' at Kartein dinners requires an ingredient no restaurant supplier carries.

characters.name: 미리암 골드스타인
characters.title: 카르테인 고문서 복원가
characters.prompt: Female Israeli-American ancient document restorer, appears late 50s. Scholar of forbidden texts. Wild curly grey-streaked dark hair. Intense dark brown eyes behind magnifying spectacles. Wool shawl over a linen blouse, cotton archival gloves. Carefully handling a crumbling parchment with medieval Latin script in a humidity-controlled chamber. Reverent fascinated expression — she's restoring Kartein family records written in blood-ink dating back to the Crusades.

characters.name: 김승원
characters.title: 센터 응급대응 코디네이터
characters.prompt: Male Korean center emergency response coordinator, mid-35s. Crisis manager who never panics. Short dark hair with a clean side part. Calm steady dark eyes with an authoritative gaze. White coat over a dark polo, emergency radio clipped to belt, center crisis management badge. Standing before a situation board with red markers. Focused commanding expression — he coordinates blood deliveries during disasters and recently received priority requests that bypassed every normal protocol.

characters.name: 유은수
characters.title: 센터 출입관리 담당
characters.prompt: Female Korean center access control officer, mid-35s. Meticulous gatekeeper with a sharp memory. Dark hair in a short practical cut. Alert questioning dark eyes. Dark navy uniform with access control badge, ID scanner in hand. Standing at the center entrance checkpoint with a turnstile and camera monitors behind her. Firm watchful expression — she has memorized every face authorized to enter and the list of after-hours visitors includes names with no corresponding employee records.

characters.name: 니콜라오스 스타브로스
characters.title: 그리스 해운 재벌 (카르테인 후원자)
characters.prompt: Male Greek shipping magnate and Kartein patron, appears 60s. Mediterranean tycoon with ancient bloodline. Thick silver-white hair swept back from a tanned, leonine face. Deep dark eyes with centuries of Mediterranean sun. White linen suit with a sapphire-blue silk shirt open at the collar, gold Rolex. Standing on the deck of a luxury yacht at sunset. Commanding regal expression — his shipping empire has transported Kartein cargo across the Mediterranean since the Byzantine era and his loyalty to the family is older than most nations.

characters.name: 아나스타시아 코발렌코
characters.title: 카르테인 발레리나 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Ukrainian prima ballerina cover, appears mid-20s but with eyes far older. Otherworldly grace incarnate. Platinum hair in a perfect ballet bun with pearl pins. Haunting pale grey eyes with flecks of violet. White swan tutu with crystal-studded bodice, pointe shoes ribbons trailing. One arm extended in arabesque pose with impossible poise. Ethereal melancholic expression — she has danced for the Kartein family for longer than the Bolshoi Theatre has existed, and her performances entrance audiences into a trance that erases their memories of the evening.

characters.name: 가브리엘 산토스
characters.title: 상파울루 야간 응급실 의사
characters.prompt: Male Brazilian ER doctor in Sao Paulo, mid-35s. Exhausted healer in a warzone hospital. Dark curly hair, warm bronze skin with stubble. Tired but compassionate dark brown eyes. Blood-stained green scrubs under a wrinkled white coat. Stethoscope and trauma shears in pocket. Hospital corridor background with fluorescent lights. Weary determined expression — he treated a patient with impossibly fast wound regeneration and the patient vanished from the ward before dawn, leaving blood samples that dissolved in the test tubes.

characters.name: 지민서
characters.title: 환경운동 대학생
characters.prompt: Female Korean environmental activist college student, early 20s. Idealistic young campaigner with boundless energy. Long dark hair with a braided strand, fresh face with freckles. Bright passionate dark eyes. Oversized flannel shirt tied at waist over eco-friendly T-shirt with canvas tote bag. Holding water quality testing equipment near a stream behind the blood center. Alarmed expression — the water runoff from the center contains biological compounds her university lab can't identify.

characters.name: 권상호
characters.title: 혈연센터 지하 보일러공
characters.prompt: Male Korean center basement boiler technician, late 50s. Solitary worker in the building's depths. Thin grey hair, deeply lined face. Weary knowing dark eyes. Faded grey work coveralls with grease stains, heavy boots. Standing next to massive industrial pipes and gauges in a dimly lit boiler room. Holding a worn flashlight. Resigned unsettled expression — he's worked in the basement for twenty years and the sealed section beyond the boiler room hums with machinery that runs on no power source he can trace.

characters.name: 아데바요 박사
characters.title: WHO 아프리카 혈액안전 자문
characters.prompt: Female Nigerian WHO blood safety advisor for Africa, late 40s. Formidable public health authority with unshakeable integrity. Close-cropped natural hair with grey temples. Piercing dark brown eyes full of authority. Elegant navy suit with WHO lanyard and African Union advisory pin. Standing at a podium with UN flags behind her. Holding a damning statistical report. Fierce resolute expression — she discovered that blood donation volumes in twelve African nations don't match the blood products reaching hospitals, and the deficit exactly matches the Kartein network's estimated consumption.

characters.name: 세바스찬 헤일
characters.title: 카르테인 가문 초상화가
characters.prompt: Male British portrait painter, appears 30s but his technique spans centuries. Timeless artist with a secret canvas. Tousled dark brown hair with paint flecks. Warm intense amber eyes with extraordinary depth. Paint-stained white linen shirt with a burgundy waistcoat, sleeves rolled to elbows. Holding a palette and fine sable brush before an easel. Studio background with portraits spanning different centuries showing the same Kartein faces. Absorbed creative expression — he has painted every generation of the Kartein family for 400 years and he is the only non-family member who knows the full truth.

characters.name: 남수정
characters.title: 국립과학수사연구원 독성학자
characters.prompt: Female Korean national forensic toxicologist, early 40s. Meticulous poison expert with nerves of ice. Dark hair pulled back in a sleek low ponytail. Cold focused dark eyes behind safety glasses. Blue forensic lab coat with NFS badge, latex gloves. Examining mass spectrometry results on a monitor showing unknown compound peaks. Clinical fascinated expression — the substance she isolated from a crime scene victim's blood matches no known toxin and seems to break down human hemoglobin to extract iron in a way that mimics digestion.

characters.name: 박근수
characters.title: 혈연센터 옥상 통신탑 관리인
characters.prompt: Male Korean center rooftop communications tower caretaker, mid-40s. Lonely high-altitude worker. Wind-tousled grey-streaked dark hair. Squinting dark eyes from constant sun and wind exposure. Orange high-visibility vest over work clothes, safety harness dangling. Standing on the center rooftop next to antenna arrays with the city spread below. Uneasy puzzled expression — the communication equipment on the roof includes encrypted transmitters that don't connect to any Korean telecom network and broadcast in frequencies he's never encountered.

characters.name: 이자벨 모로
characters.title: 카르테인 향수 조향사 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female French perfumer cover, appears late 38s but with the poise of centuries. Sensory genius with an impossible gift. Elegant dark auburn waves cascading past shoulders. Deep violet-tinged dark eyes with an almost hypnotic quality. Flowing ivory silk blouse with antique amethyst pendant, surrounded by crystal perfume bottles and raw ingredients. Holding a scent strip to her nose in a candlelit Parisian atelier. Serene intoxicated expression — she can identify any human by their blood scent alone, and her 'perfume consultations' are actually blood-typing sessions for the Kartein's most selective members.

characters.name: 신원호
characters.title: 국가기록원 문서관리관
characters.prompt: Male Korean national archives document manager, early 50s. Meticulous records keeper with an accidental discovery. Neat grey hair, thin mustache. Patient observant dark eyes behind reading glasses. Formal grey suit with government archive badge. Seated at a research desk surrounded by old documents and microfilm readers. Holding a declassified Cold War-era intelligence report. Quietly shocked expression — he found a 1953 CIA document referencing a 'European blood aristocracy network' operating in post-war Korea that matches the Kartein family's current structure exactly.

characters.name: 홍재경
characters.title: 센터 야간 당직의
characters.prompt: Male Korean center night-shift duty doctor, late 30s. Solitary physician who guards the night. Sharp angular face with permanent five o'clock shadow. Intense dark eyes with insomnia-red rims. Wrinkled white coat over dark scrubs, cold coffee cup in hand. Standing alone in the center's empty corridor at 3 AM under harsh fluorescent lights. Wary haunted expression — he's the only doctor authorized for the night shift and he treats patients who arrive through entrances not on the building plans, patients whose vital signs defy every medical textbook he studied.

characters.name: 마야 첸라이트
characters.title: MIT 생명공학 교수
characters.prompt: Female Chinese-American MIT bioengineering professor, late 30s. Genius scientist on the verge of the century's biggest discovery. Straight black hair with a bold red streak. Fierce brilliant dark eyes behind chic angular glasses. Black blazer over a band T-shirt with MIT faculty badge, holding a groundbreaking research paper. Holographic DNA model glowing beside her. Electrified expression of someone who has connected every dot — she independently derived the biological mechanism behind the Kartein's condition and her encrypted paper, if published, would expose them to the entire world.

characters.name: 조혜린
characters.title: 수면검사실 기사
characters.prompt: Female Korean sleep lab technician, mid-20s. Calm nocturnal worker monitoring donor rest cycles. Soft dark hair in a low braid. Quiet observant dark eyes with subtle dark circles. Lavender scrubs with a sleep lab badge, holding an EEG electrode with care. Dim monitoring room with polysomnography screens glowing behind her. Serene focused expression — she noticed certain VIP donors show brainwave patterns during sleep that no medical textbook describes.

characters.name: 문재호
characters.title: 혈액은행 기록보관사
characters.prompt: Male Korean blood bank archivist, late 40s. Methodical record keeper surrounded by decades of files. Thin grey-streaked hair, reading glasses perched on nose tip. Careful dark eyes scanning old ledgers. Brown cardigan over a dress shirt with archive department badge. Standing in a vault of filing cabinets with yellowed folders. Quietly troubled expression — the oldest donation records in the archive reference donors whose blood types use a classification system that was never officially adopted.

characters.name: 유지연
characters.title: 헌혈자 심리연구원
characters.prompt: Female Korean donor psychology researcher, early 30s. Academic studying donor behavior and motivation. Wavy dark brown hair with tortoiseshell barrette. Thoughtful analytical dark eyes. Cream blouse under a lab coat, holding a psychology assessment clipboard. Cozy research office with behavioral studies on the walls. Intrigued concerned expression — her longitudinal study shows that frequent donors near the center develop an unexplainable craving to return, as if addicted.

characters.name: 류동진
characters.title: 유전상담사
characters.prompt: Male Korean genetic counselor, mid-30s. Patient specialist who explains complex genetics to families. Neat dark hair with a gentle face. Warm empathetic dark eyes behind round glasses. White coat over a sage-green dress shirt, genetic pedigree charts pinned to a corkboard behind him. Holding a tablet showing a family tree with highlighted anomalies. Reassuring but privately alarmed expression — some donor families share genetic markers that shouldn't exist in Homo sapiens.

characters.name: 권민지
characters.title: 생명윤리관
characters.prompt: Female Korean bioethics officer, early 40s. Principled watchdog with a philosophy background. Silver-streaked dark hair in a neat French twist. Stern penetrating dark eyes. Navy blazer with a bioethics committee pin over a white turtleneck. Reviewing consent forms with a red pen at a conference table. Lips pressed in disapproval — the informed consent procedures for the center's 'special program' donors violate every ethical guideline she's sworn to uphold.

characters.name: 손태경
characters.title: 이동헌혈차 코디네이터
characters.prompt: Male Korean mobile blood drive coordinator, early 30s. Energetic organizer who brings donation drives to communities. Short dark hair, sun-tanned face from outdoor work. Enthusiastic dark eyes. Red polo shirt with blood center logo, clipboard and megaphone in hand. Standing beside a branded mobile blood collection bus at a university campus. Upbeat rallying expression — his drives are wildly successful but he can't figure out why head office routes certain buses to unmarked locations at night.

characters.name: 배유진
characters.title: 콜드체인 관리사
characters.prompt: Female Korean cold chain specialist, late 20s. Temperature-obsessed logistics expert. Dark hair under a thermal hood pushed back. Alert precise dark eyes. Insulated blue cold-storage uniform with digital thermometer clipped to pocket. Checking temperature readings on a blood transport cooler with a data logger. Meticulous concentrated expression — the cold chain requirements for certain VIP shipments demand temperatures far below any standard blood storage protocol.

characters.name: 최하늘
characters.title: 혈액내과 전임의
characters.prompt: Male Korean hematology fellow, late 20s. Brilliant young doctor specializing in blood disorders. Slightly disheveled dark hair from long hours. Intense earnest dark eyes with perpetual curiosity. Wrinkled white coat over blue scrubs, stethoscope and pocket reference guide. Examining a peripheral blood smear under a microscope. Astonished expression — the cells he's looking at display regenerative properties that could revolutionize medicine, but his supervising professor told him to destroy the slides.

characters.name: 신지우
characters.title: 봉사자 관리 매니저
characters.prompt: Female Korean volunteer manager, mid-30s. Organized people-person who coordinates all center volunteers. Dark hair in a practical bob with colorful scarf. Warm open dark brown eyes. Red blazer with a 'Volunteer Services' badge, tablet showing scheduling app. Standing in the volunteer lounge with a gratitude wall behind her. Friendly capable expression — she manages fifty regular volunteers but recently noticed that ten of them have no verifiable personal history before joining.

characters.name: 에밀 일마즈
characters.title: 이스탄불 보석상 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Turkish jeweler cover in Istanbul, appears late 40s. Refined craftsman with ancient tastes. Thick dark hair with distinguished grey at temples, well-groomed mustache. Deep warm brown eyes with a merchant's shrewdness. Tailored dark vest over a crisp white shirt with gold cufflinks shaped like crescent moons. Examining a blood-red ruby through a jeweler's loupe in a candlelit Grand Bazaar shop. Appraising expression — his gemstone shipments between Istanbul and Vienna conceal vials of rare blood types in padded cases.

characters.name: 셀람 베켈레
characters.title: 아디스아바바 커피 무역상 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Ethiopian coffee trader cover in Addis Ababa, appears early 30s. Elegant with regal bearing. Rich dark skin, natural hair in an elaborate crown of braids with gold thread. Bright intelligent dark brown eyes. White cotton shawl with traditional Ethiopian embroidery over a modern olive dress. Cupping coffee beans at a tasting table with burlap sacks behind her. Gracious knowing smile — her premium coffee exports to Europe carry temperature-controlled blood samples packed beneath the beans.

characters.name: 레이스 델라크루즈
characters.title: 마닐라 자선재단 대표 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Filipino charity foundation head cover in Manila, appears mid-35s. Charismatic humanitarian with a hidden agenda. Clean-cut dark hair, warm bronze skin. Earnest dark brown eyes that inspire trust. Light linen suit with a charity pin and woven bracelet. Holding a presentation about rural health initiatives with smiling children's photos behind him. Sincere passionate expression — his charity's free blood testing drives in remote provinces are the Kartein's primary Southeast Asian blood sourcing operation.

characters.name: 이수진
characters.title: 센터 약제과장
characters.prompt: Female Korean center pharmacy department head, mid-40s. Exacting pharmacist who controls every substance entering the center. Dark hair with silver threads in a neat updo. Sharp watchful dark eyes behind cat-eye glasses. White pharmacist coat with department head badge, standing in a climate-controlled pharmaceutical storage room. Inspecting a shipment of unmarked vials with a handheld scanner. Suspicious tight-lipped expression — the monthly pharmaceutical deliveries include compounds not listed in any Korean pharmacopeia.

characters.name: 아피냐 사왓
characters.title: 방콕 전통의학 연구자 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Thai traditional medicine researcher cover in Bangkok, appears late 20s. Serene healer with dangerous knowledge. Straight black hair adorned with a jasmine garland. Calm dark eyes with gold-flecked irises. Silk wraparound blouse in deep plum over traditional Thai fisherman pants. Grinding herbs with a stone mortar surrounded by ancient medical manuscripts. Peaceful focused expression — her research into Thai royal bloodletting rituals uncovered connections to the Kartein that span eight centuries.

characters.name: 조성훈
characters.title: 등대지기
characters.prompt: Male Korean lighthouse keeper, early 60s. Solitary coastal guardian who watches the sea. Weather-beaten face, thick grey hair under a worn fisherman's cap. Deep calm dark eyes with permanent squint lines. Navy blue wool sweater with a waterproof vest, brass telescope in hand. Standing at the top of a lighthouse with crashing waves below. Stoic reflective expression — he's watched unmarked ships anchor offshore on moonless nights and seen small boats ferry sealed containers to the blood center's coastal warehouse.

characters.name: 쩐 민 득
characters.title: 하노이 골동품 수집가 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Vietnamese antique collector cover in Hanoi, appears 40s. Cultured scholar with a taste for the ancient. Neat dark hair swept back, refined angular features. Piercing dark eyes with intellectual depth. Mandarin-collared silk jacket in midnight blue over tailored trousers, jade bracelet on one wrist. Examining a centuries-old lacquerware box in a French colonial-style shop. Contemplative expression — his network of antique dealers across Southeast Asia doubles as a Kartein communications and blood logistics chain.

characters.name: 정미래
characters.title: 화산 연구원
characters.prompt: Female Korean volcanologist, early 30s. Fearless scientist who studies the earth's fury. Wind-blown dark hair tied back with a bandana. Intense focused dark eyes. Khaki field vest covered in dust over a thermal base layer, gas mask hanging at neck. Holding a thermal imaging device near a volcanic vent on Jeju Island. Determined expression — soil samples near the blood center's underground levels show geothermal signatures identical to volcanic activity, but Seoul has no volcanoes.

characters.name: 김연우
characters.title: 지하철 버스커
characters.prompt: Male Korean subway busker, early 20s. Soulful street musician with perfect pitch. Shaggy dark brown hair falling over one eye. Dreamy sensitive dark eyes. Worn denim jacket with patches, acoustic guitar with stickers. Sitting on a folding stool in a subway station near the blood center. Wistful melodic expression — he plays here every night and noticed that certain passengers who exit at the center stop move with an uncanny, inhuman grace.

characters.name: 레이라니 케알로하
characters.title: 하와이 해양생물학자
characters.prompt: Female Hawaiian marine biologist, late 20s. Ocean scientist studying deep-sea life. Long dark wavy hair with a plumeria flower tucked behind ear. Bright warm brown eyes with sun-kissed freckles. Rash guard over board shorts with a coral research badge, underwater camera around neck. Holding a specimen jar with bioluminescent deep-sea organisms. Amazed curious expression — the bioluminescent compound she extracted from deep-sea creatures off Hawaii is chemically identical to a substance found in the Kartein family's private blood reserves.

characters.name: 서정화
characters.title: 센터 교육훈련 담당관
characters.prompt: Female Korean center education and training officer, late 30s. Strict instructor who trains all new staff. Dark hair in a sleek low ponytail. Authoritative dark eyes with an uncompromising gaze. Smart white blouse with a center training department badge, laser pointer in one hand, training manual in the other. Standing before a projection screen in a classroom. No-nonsense disciplined expression — her training curriculum includes a classified module accessible only to staff with Level 5 clearance, and she's never been told what it contains.

characters.name: 마카이오 투포우
characters.title: 폴리네시아 항해사
characters.prompt: Male Polynesian traditional navigator, mid-40s. Master wayfinder who reads the ocean. Broad powerful build, rich brown skin with traditional Polynesian tattoos on shoulders and arms. Deep dark eyes that have memorized star charts. Woven lavalava with a bone pendant, hand on the steering oar of a traditional canoe. Ocean and stars behind him. Noble determined expression — his ancestral navigation chants describe 'pale seafarers who drank life' and their routes match the Kartein's Pacific blood shipping lanes exactly.

characters.name: 최준호
characters.title: 경쟁형 먹방 유튜버
characters.prompt: Male Korean competitive eating YouTuber, late 20s. Loud, fearless food challenger with a massive following. Messy dyed reddish-brown hair. Wide energetic dark eyes. Graphic T-shirt with his channel logo, bib around neck. Sitting before a mountain of food with a timer running, chopsticks poised. Excited determined grin — he filmed a mukbang challenge at a restaurant near the blood center and his footage captured cloaked figures carrying medical coolers into a back alley at 2 AM.

characters.name: 헤이키 비르타넨
characters.title: 핀란드 오로라 사진작가
characters.prompt: Male Finnish aurora photographer, mid-35s. Patient night-sky artist who captures light in darkness. Sandy blond hair, pale blue eyes adapted to long Arctic nights. Red-cheeked from cold. Heavy parka over thermal layers, advanced camera on a tripod with intervalometer. Standing in a snowy Finnish landscape with green aurora overhead. Contemplative expression — his long-exposure photographs of the northern sky above a Kartein-owned estate revealed figures moving at impossible speeds across the snowfield.

characters.name: 곽소연
characters.title: 드론 레이서
characters.prompt: Female Korean drone racer, early 20s. Adrenaline junkie with lightning reflexes. Short choppy black hair with neon green streaks. Bright intense dark eyes. Racing jacket covered in sponsor patches, FPV goggles pushed up on forehead, custom racing drone in hand. Crouching at a drone racing course start line. Fierce competitive expression — she was practicing night flights near the blood center and her drone's camera recorded a hidden rooftop helipad being used by unmarked helicopters.

characters.name: 앵거스 맥클라우드
characters.title: 스코틀랜드 위스키 증류사 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Scottish whisky distiller cover, appears late 50s. Weathered Highlander with an ancient family secret. Thick grey-red beard, ruddy complexion. Keen sharp blue eyes under bushy eyebrows. Tweed jacket over a cable-knit sweater with a clan tartan scarf. Holding a copper pot still sample glass of amber liquid in a stone distillery. Warm knowing expression — his family's Highland distillery has been a Kartein safehouse since the Jacobite era, and certain 'rare cask' barrels contain something far more precious than whisky.

characters.name: 유세현
characters.title: 도시양봉가
characters.prompt: Male Korean urban beekeeper, mid-35s. Gentle apiarist tending rooftop hives. Tousled dark brown hair, warm sun-browned face. Calm observant dark eyes. White beekeeper suit unzipped to waist, smoker tool in hand. Surrounded by beehives on a Seoul rooftop with the city skyline behind. Peaceful puzzled expression — his bees on the building next to the blood center produce honey with an unusual crimson tint and they swarm aggressively whenever the center's basement ventilation system activates.

characters.name: 윤하은
characters.title: 미니어처 모형 제작자
characters.prompt: Female Korean miniature model builder, mid-25s. Meticulous craftsperson with extraordinary attention to detail. Dark hair with bangs, thin-framed glasses. Focused precise dark eyes. Grey apron over a striped shirt, magnifying headset around neck. Painting a tiny architectural model of the blood center with a fine brush. Puzzled frown — while researching the building for her scale model, she found architectural plans online showing underground levels that don't match the publicly filed blueprints.

characters.name: 박진영
characters.title: 폭풍추적자
characters.prompt: Male Korean storm chaser, early 30s. Fearless meteorologist who drives into danger. Windswept dark hair, chapped lips from exposure. Fierce determined dark eyes. Heavy-duty weather jacket with anemometer and portable weather station strapped to his truck. Standing before a wall of dark thunderclouds with lightning. Exhilarated focused expression — his atmospheric pressure sensors detected anomalous electromagnetic pulses emanating from beneath the blood center during every major thunderstorm.

characters.name: 리아논 프라이스
characters.title: 웨일스 민속학자
characters.prompt: Female Welsh folklorist, mid-40s. Academic collector of ancient blood-drinking legends. Wild curly auburn hair with grey streaks. Piercing green eyes full of scholarly fire. Worn leather satchel over a woolen coat with a Celtic brooch. Holding a hand-bound notebook filled with field sketches of folklore creatures. Standing in a misty Welsh hillside with standing stones. Intense knowing expression — her cross-cultural analysis of blood-drinking myths from six continents reveals a single origin point that matches the Kartein family's genealogical records.

characters.name: 임해진
characters.title: 푸드트럭 사장
characters.prompt: Female Korean food truck owner, late 30s. Hardworking entrepreneur who parks outside the blood center. Dark hair under a cute chef bandana. Warm tired dark eyes with flour on her cheek. Colorful apron with her food truck logo, spatula in one hand. Standing in her truck's service window with Korean fusion tacos displayed. Friendly entrepreneurial expression — she parks here because the late-night crowd tips generously in crisp foreign banknotes, and they always order their meat as rare as possible.

characters.name: 마티아시 사보
characters.title: 부다페스트 골동시계 복원사 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Hungarian antique clock restorer cover in Budapest, appears late 50s. Patient craftsman of time itself. Thin silver hair combed neatly, reading glasses on a chain. Steady grey-blue eyes with meticulous focus. Dark wool vest over a white shirt with rolled sleeves, watchmaker's loupe on a headband. Surrounded by centuries-old grandfather clocks and pocket watches in a dimly lit workshop. Reverent precise expression — his workshop beneath the Buda Castle district contains Kartein timepieces that still run perfectly after 500 years, wound by a mechanism that uses blood instead of springs.

characters.name: 이연화
characters.title: 방탈출 카페 디자이너
characters.prompt: Female Korean escape room designer, late 20s. Creative puzzle architect with a dark aesthetic. Asymmetric dyed dark purple hair. Bright imaginative dark eyes. Black turtleneck with a leather tool belt of props. Standing in an elaborate escape room set with gothic horror theme. Mischievous creative expression — she designed a vampire-themed escape room near the blood center, and a group of well-dressed European patrons completed every puzzle in under two minutes with disturbing familiarity.

characters.name: 강도하
characters.title: 팟캐스트 진행자
characters.prompt: Male Korean podcast host, mid-25s. True-crime enthusiast with a growing audience. Messy dark hair with wireless earbuds always in. Quick intelligent dark eyes. Casual hoodie with his podcast logo, professional condenser microphone on a boom arm. Sitting in a soundproofed home studio with evidence boards behind him. Animated storytelling expression — his podcast episode about mysterious blood center disappearances went viral and now he's receiving anonymous tips in sealed envelopes with no return address.

characters.name: 딜라라 케말
characters.title: 카르테인 오페라 후원자
characters.prompt: Female Turkish opera patron, appears late 38s. Magnificent diva of high culture. Lustrous dark hair swept up in an elaborate updo with diamond pins. Mesmerizing dark eyes with gold eyeshadow. Stunning deep crimson velvet opera gown with a fur stole and sapphire pendant. Seated in a private opera box with gilded railings, opera glasses in gloved hand. Imperious appreciative expression — she has endowed opera houses across four continents and her private post-performance suppers are Kartein blood-tasting ceremonies disguised as patron receptions.

characters.name: 유선우
characters.title: 빈티지 바이닐 수집가
characters.prompt: Male Korean vintage vinyl collector, early 30s. Obsessive audiophile with golden ears. Messy wavy dark hair, stubble. Warm nostalgic dark eyes. Corduroy jacket over a band T-shirt, carrying a crate of rare vinyl records. Standing in a cramped record shop with floor-to-ceiling shelves. Delighted expression — he found an unlabeled 78 RPM record pressed in dark red wax at a flea market near the blood center, and when played, it contains what sounds like a centuries-old chant in a language no linguist can identify.

characters.name: 나가은
characters.title: 경쟁형 암벽등반가
characters.prompt: Female Korean competitive rock climber, early 20s. Powerful athlete with nerves of steel. Lean muscular build, dark hair in a tight bun with chalk dust. Fierce determined dark eyes. Tank top showing defined arms, climbing harness and chalk bag at waist. Mid-climb on an indoor bouldering wall with colorful holds. Focused intense expression — she trains at the climbing gym adjacent to the blood center and heard inhuman screams echoing through the shared wall during a midnight training session.

characters.name: 바야르마 볼드
characters.title: 몽골 유목민 출신 역사학자
characters.prompt: Female Mongolian nomadic heritage historian, early 50s. Steppe scholar with wind in her blood. Weathered bronze face with high cheekbones. Wise intense dark eyes. Traditional Mongolian deel coat in deep blue with silver fastenings over modern clothes. Holding an ancient scroll with Mongol script. University library background. Resolute scholarly expression — her research into Genghis Khan's 'immortal advisors' uncovered a bloodline that matches the Kartein's European branch, suggesting the family's reach extended across the entire Silk Road.

characters.name: 고유진
characters.title: 유리공예 작가
characters.prompt: Female Korean glass blower, mid-35s. Fire artist creating beauty from molten sand. Dark hair tied back with a leather cord, flushed face from furnace heat. Bright creative dark eyes behind safety glasses. Heavy apron over a thermal shirt, holding a glowing molten glass blob on a blowpipe. Workshop with colorful finished pieces and a roaring glory hole furnace. Absorbed creative expression — she was commissioned to create custom blood-red glass vials for an anonymous European client, and the specifications require glass that blocks UV light completely.

characters.name: 황지석
characters.title: 거리 마술사
characters.prompt: Male Korean street magician, late 20s. Charismatic performer who makes the impossible look easy. Slicked-back dark hair with a mischievous face. Sparkling dark eyes with a perpetual twinkle. Black vest over a white shirt with rolled sleeves, deck of cards fanned in one hand. Performing on a busy Seoul street corner near the blood center. Dramatic flourishing expression — he performed a blood-themed card trick for a group of elegant European strangers and one of them replicated it flawlessly with genuinely supernatural speed.

characters.name: 호르헤 바르가스
characters.title: 페루 고고학자
characters.prompt: Male Peruvian archaeologist, mid-40s. Field researcher uncovering pre-Columbian blood rituals. Dark weathered skin, thick black hair with dust. Intense dark brown eyes behind scratched field glasses. Khaki field shirt with a university dig badge, trowel and brush in hand. Kneeling at an Inca excavation site with ceramic vessels. Stunned expression — the ritual bloodletting vessels he unearthed in the Andes contain preserved blood residue with the same anomalous genetic markers found in the Korean blood center's secret samples.

characters.name: 손은지
characters.title: 종이접기 명인
characters.prompt: Female Korean origami master, late 60s. Patient artist who folds paper into life. White hair in a soft bun, gentle wrinkled face. Calm perceptive dark eyes behind half-moon glasses. Simple hanbok-style blouse, surrounded by intricate origami figures — cranes, dragons, flowers. Folding a complex blood-red paper rose with steady fingers. Serene cryptic expression — a mysterious European woman visits her shop monthly to commission origami patterns that, when unfolded, reveal encoded messages in a language the master recognizes from ancient Korean court documents.

characters.name: 권태민
characters.title: 야시장 사진작가
characters.prompt: Male Korean night market photographer, early 20s. Nocturnal visual storyteller capturing Seoul after dark. Tousled dark hair, pale from nightlife. Observant dark eyes always framing shots. Black jacket with a vintage film camera and flash unit, lens cap hanging. Crouching in a bustling night market with neon signs and steam. Alert artistic expression — his long-exposure night photography near the blood center captured streaks of movement too fast for any human, and when he enlarged the image, he saw faces.

characters.name: 로넌 캘러한
characters.title: 카르테인 레어 오키드 수집가
characters.prompt: Male Irish rare orchid collector, appears 40s. Botanical obsessive with an aristocrat's refinement. Wavy auburn hair, pale freckled skin. Intense green eyes with a botanist's passion. Moss-green velvet blazer over a white linen shirt, antique brass magnifying glass in hand. Standing in a private greenhouse filled with impossibly rare orchids. Reverent expression — his orchid collection includes species thought extinct for centuries, kept alive by a proprietary fertilizer derived from the Kartein family's blood processing waste.

characters.name: 권나영
characters.title: 센터 수혈간호 교육자
characters.prompt: Female Korean center transfusion nursing educator, early 40s. Veteran teacher training the next generation. Dark hair with reading glasses perched on head. Patient but exacting dark eyes. White nurse uniform with an education department badge, holding a training mannequin arm with IV lines. Classroom setting with medical posters. Firm instructive expression — she's trained hundreds of nurses but recently received new training materials from management that include procedures she's never seen in thirty years of nursing.

characters.name: 페르난도 실바
characters.title: 포르투갈 선주업자 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Portuguese shipowner cover, appears mid-40s. Maritime aristocrat with a navigator's blood. Dark hair streaked with sea-salt grey, tanned olive skin. Deep dark eyes with centuries of ocean in them. Navy blazer with brass buttons and a compass rose lapel pin over a white open-collar shirt. Standing on a dock in Lisbon with historic sailing vessels behind him. Proud nostalgic expression — his family's shipping fleet has served the Kartein since the Age of Exploration, and the secret compartments in his ships' keels were designed by the same shipwrights who built Portuguese carracks.

characters.name: 장예은
characters.title: 얼음조각가
characters.prompt: Female Korean ice sculptor, late 20s. Cold-weather artist who carves beauty from frozen water. Dark hair under a warm beanie, red cheeks from cold. Bright creative dark eyes. Insulated work jacket with ice chips clinging to it, electric chainsaw and chisel at her side. Carving an elaborate dragon from a massive ice block in a freezer studio. Intense focused expression — she was hired to create ice sculptures for a Kartein winter gala and the venue's walk-in freezer contained sealed medical containers behind her ice blocks.

characters.name: 체링 도르제
characters.title: 티베트 전통의학 승려
characters.prompt: Male Tibetan traditional medicine monk, early 70s. Serene healer with ancient knowledge. Shaved head, deeply lined bronze face. Calm compassionate dark eyes radiating peace. Maroon and saffron robes with a prayer mala around one wrist. Holding a Tibetan medical thangka scroll depicting the body's energy channels. Seated in a monastery with Himalayan peaks visible through a window. Transcendent knowing expression — Tibetan medical texts in his monastery describe beings who subsist on blood and live centuries, and his diagnostic methods can detect their unique pulse patterns.

characters.name: 이시원
characters.title: 센터 감염병 역학조사관
characters.prompt: Male Korean center epidemiological investigator, mid-35s. Disease detective tracking anomalous infection patterns. Short neat dark hair, clean-shaven intense face. Sharp analytical dark eyes. White coat over dark clothes with CDC-style field investigation badge. Holding an epidemiological map with red cluster markers around the blood center. Standing in a situation room with disease tracking screens. Grave focused expression — the infection clusters around the center follow no known pathogen's transmission pattern but perfectly match the movement schedule of certain VIP visitors.

characters.name: 아나 코바츠
characters.title: 루마니아 성(城) 관리인 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Romanian castle caretaker cover, appears early 40s. Gothic guardian of an ancient estate. Long straight black hair with a widow's peak. Pale grey eyes with quiet intensity. Dark velvet dress with antique key necklace, iron ring of medieval keys at her belt. Standing in a torchlit stone corridor of a Transylvanian castle. Stoic devoted expression — she maintains the Kartein family's ancestral castle in the Carpathian Mountains, where the deepest wine cellars hold not wine but centuries of preserved blood in crystal decanters.

characters.name: 하성현
characters.title: 센터 헌혈자 라운지 매니저
characters.prompt: Male Korean donor lounge manager, late 20s. Hospitable host who keeps donors comfortable. Neat dark hair with a friendly round face. Warm welcoming dark eyes. Smart-casual polo with center logo, carrying a tray of juice and snacks. Standing in a cozy donor recovery lounge with comfortable recliners and soft lighting. Bright caring expression — he ensures every donor gets the best recovery experience, but certain 'premium' donors are escorted to a private lounge he has no key to access.

characters.name: 알레한드라 레예스
characters.title: 칠레 천문대 후원자 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Chilean observatory benefactor cover, appears mid-35s. Stargazer aristocrat with nocturnal habits. Long dark hair flowing over one shoulder, olive skin. Deep dark eyes reflecting starlight. Elegant white cashmere wrap over a midnight-blue dress with constellation embroidery. Standing on the observation deck of an Atacama Desert telescope facility. Contemplative regal expression — her lavish funding of Chilean observatories provides the Kartein with satellite tracking capabilities and a legitimate reason for their members to be awake only at night.

characters.name: 데본 캠벨
characters.title: 자메이카 레코드 프로듀서 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Jamaican record producer cover, appears early 30s. Magnetic music mogul with hidden loyalties. Short dreadlocks with gold tips, warm dark brown skin. Charismatic dark eyes with a producer's ear. Vintage leather jacket over a graphic tee with gold chain and headphones around neck. Standing in a professional recording studio with mixing board. Easy confident smile — his Kingston studio doubles as a Kartein Caribbean operations center, and certain 'reggae tour' shipments between Jamaica and Europe carry temperature-controlled cargo that isn't music equipment.

characters.name: 송하연
characters.title: 수어통역사
characters.prompt: Female Korean sign language interpreter, early 30s. Bridge between worlds of sound and silence. Expressive dark hair framing an animated face. Clear communicative dark eyes. Simple navy blouse with interpreter badge, hands frozen mid-sign. Standing in a hospital corridor with natural light. Alert compassionate expression — she interpreted for a deaf donor at the blood center and the donor signed frantically about seeing people in the basement 'drinking from glass cups filled with something that looked like blood' before being quickly escorted away.

characters.name: 신동우
characters.title: 점자도서관 사서
characters.prompt: Male Korean braille librarian, mid-40s. Dedicated caretaker of tactile knowledge. Gentle face with thin-framed glasses. Patient kind dark eyes. Brown corduroy jacket with library ID badge, fingers resting on a braille text. Standing in a quiet library section with braille books and tactile maps. Thoughtful expression — a blind regular patron described hearing conversations in an unknown language in the blood center's restricted corridor, with voices she said 'vibrated differently than any human voice.'

characters.name: 수레시 페레라
characters.title: 스리랑카 차(茶) 수출상 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Sri Lankan tea exporter cover, appears late 40s. Dignified merchant with colonial-era connections. Neat dark hair with silver temples, warm brown skin. Intelligent dark eyes with a trader's shrewdness. Light linen suit with a Ceylon tea company pin, porcelain teacup in hand. Standing in a Colombo tea warehouse with stacked wooden crates. Refined hospitable expression — his premium tea shipments to Kartein estates across Europe include lead-lined compartments that keep blood samples viable during the two-week ocean transit.

characters.name: 유채린
characters.title: 안내견 훈련사
characters.prompt: Female Korean guide dog trainer, late 20s. Patient animal handler with deep empathy. Long dark hair in a loose braid. Warm gentle dark brown eyes. Blue training vest with a service dog organization logo, holding a leash attached to a golden retriever in a training harness. Standing in a park near the blood center. Concerned caring expression — her trained dogs consistently refuse to walk past the blood center at night, displaying fear responses she's never seen in any other location.

characters.name: 문지원
characters.title: 센터 임상시험 코디네이터
characters.prompt: Female Korean center clinical trial coordinator, early 30s. Organized researcher managing experimental protocols. Neat dark hair with a practical clip. Attentive dark eyes behind slim glasses. White coat with a clinical research badge, holding a tablet with trial enrollment data. Standing in a clinical research office with protocol binders. Careful measured expression — the clinical trial she's coordinating uses an experimental blood product with properties she can't find documented in any pharmaceutical database.

characters.name: 라시다 칸
characters.title: 카라치 병원 네트워크 관리자 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Pakistani hospital network administrator cover in Karachi, appears mid-35s. Brilliant systems architect with dual loyalties. Dark hair under a designer dupatta in deep maroon. Sharp intelligent dark eyes with kohl liner. Tailored charcoal business suit with a hospital IT badge, laptop bag over shoulder. Standing in a modern Karachi hospital server room with blinking network equipment. Composed calculating expression — she designed the encrypted communication network connecting Kartein-affiliated blood banks across South Asia, hidden within legitimate hospital data infrastructure.

characters.name: 박성재
characters.title: 동굴 탐험가
characters.prompt: Male Korean cave explorer, mid-35s. Underground adventurer mapping uncharted depths. Lean athletic build, dark hair matted from a helmet. Determined dark eyes reflecting headlamp light. Caving overalls with a climbing harness and headlamp, carabiners jingling at waist. Crouching in a narrow limestone cave passage with geological formations. Adrenaline-fueled expression — he discovered a natural cave system beneath Seoul that connects to tunnels under the blood center, with walls bearing ancient Latin inscriptions and dried blood.

characters.name: 곽민지
characters.title: 센터 의료정보 관리사
characters.prompt: Female Korean center health information manager, mid-25s. Digital archivist of all patient and donor data. Short dark hair with a simple headband. Attentive dark eyes behind blue-light glasses. Neat cardigan over a blouse with a health information department badge. Sitting at a dual-monitor workstation with electronic health records displayed. Quietly anxious expression — she was tasked with merging the center's old paper records into the digital system and found donor profiles with photographs from the 1950s showing people who still visit the center today, completely unaged.

characters.name: 아미르 핫산
characters.title: 방글라데시 직물 무역상 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Bangladeshi textile trader cover, appears mid-40s. Charming merchant connecting East and West. Dark hair with a neat beard, warm brown skin. Friendly shrewd dark brown eyes. Embroidered kurta under a modern blazer with a silk pocket square. Examining fine muslin fabric in a Dhaka showroom with bolts of colorful textiles. Genial businesslike expression — his family's textile export business has smuggled Kartein blood products inside sealed fabric bolt cores for three generations, using ancient trade routes that predate the British Empire.

characters.name: 정요한
characters.title: 열기구 조종사
characters.prompt: Male Korean hot air balloon pilot, mid-50s. Sky-loving adventurer with eagle eyes. Tanned weathered face, grey-streaked hair under a pilot cap. Bright adventurous dark eyes. Flight suit with a balloon pilot license badge, binoculars around neck. Standing in the basket of a colorful hot air balloon at dawn. Exhilarated free expression — during a dawn flight over Seoul, he observed the blood center's rooftop open to reveal a hidden underground entrance, and figures in dark clothing emerged briefly before dawn then disappeared back underground.

characters.name: 푸트리 울란다리
characters.title: 자카르타 NGO 대표 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Indonesian NGO director cover in Jakarta, appears late 28s. Idealistic facade masking cold pragmatism. Straight dark hair with a hibiscus flower accessory. Earnest dark brown eyes. Batik-print blazer over a white blouse with an NGO lanyard. Holding a tablet showing health campaign statistics in a modern Jakarta office. Warm professional expression — her health NGO's free blood screening program across Indonesia's 17,000 islands is the Kartein's most efficient way to identify donors with genetically rare blood types without attracting attention.

characters.name: 오승아
characters.title: 센터 감사팀 주임
characters.prompt: Female Korean center internal audit team lead, mid-35s. Meticulous auditor who follows every number. Dark hair in a strict bun with a pencil tucked in. Penetrating dark eyes behind square glasses. Navy suit with center audit department badge, stack of financial reconciliation reports in hand. Seated at a conference table covered in spreadsheets. Tense suspicious expression — her quarterly audit found a recurring discrepancy: the center purchases 40% more blood storage bags than the donation volume justifies, and the excess disappears into an unlisted cost center.

characters.name: 한여진
characters.title: 잠수부
characters.prompt: Female Korean deep sea diver, early 30s. Fearless underwater explorer. Sun-bleached dark hair tied back, tanned skin with salt residue. Bright adventurous dark eyes. Wetsuit unzipped to waist over a rash guard, diving mask pushed up on forehead. Holding a waterproof camera with footage of the ocean floor. Standing on a dive boat with diving gear. Shaken expression — while diving off Korea's southern coast, she found a sealed underwater structure connected to the mainland by a tunnel, with the Kartein family crest engraved on the hatch.

characters.name: 장우영
characters.title: 기차 기관사
characters.prompt: Male Korean train conductor, early 50s. Reliable railroad veteran who keeps the trains on time. Neatly combed grey hair under a conductor's cap. Steady dependable dark eyes. Dark blue KTX uniform with gold buttons, whistle and pocket watch. Standing at a train platform with a KTX bullet train behind him. Proud professional expression — the last KTX from Seoul every night carries a sealed, temperature-controlled cargo car that's never been on his manifest, and the station staff are under strict orders not to open it.

characters.name: 카밀라 노바크
characters.title: 체코 인형극 연출가 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Czech puppeteer director cover in Prague, appears mid-35s. Dark artist channeling centuries of tradition. Short dark hair with dramatic bangs. Intense dark eyes with theatrical flair. Black turtleneck with a velvet waistcoat, intricate marionette dangling from her fingers. Standing in a baroque puppet theatre with painted scenery. Enigmatic artistic expression — her touring puppet shows across Europe are Kartein communication events, with coded messages embedded in the plays' dialogue that only family members can decipher.

characters.name: 이서린
characters.title: 모래예술가
characters.prompt: Female Korean sand artist, mid-25s. Ephemeral storyteller who paints with grains. Long dark hair flowing freely, bare feet. Thoughtful dreamy dark eyes. Simple white linen clothes, hands coated in fine colored sand. Creating an intricate sand painting on a lightbox showing a figure drinking from a chalice. Absorbed meditative expression — she performs sand art at events and was hired for a private Kartein gathering where the audience watched her creation with tears in their eyes, as if she'd illustrated their real history.

characters.name: 트리니다드 산토스
characters.title: 쿠바 빈티지카 복원사 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Cuban vintage car restorer cover in Havana, appears late 38s. Charming mechanic with grease and secrets on his hands. Dark curly hair, warm brown skin with a bright smile. Lively dark brown eyes. Oil-stained white tank top under an open Hawaiian shirt, wrench in hand. Leaning on a perfectly restored 1957 Chevy Bel Air in cherry red. Easy charismatic expression — his classic car restoration garage in Havana has a hidden basement where Kartein blood shipments are stored in the cars' modified fuel tanks during Caribbean transit.

characters.name: 박해진
characters.title: 경쟁형 양궁 선수
characters.prompt: Male Korean competitive archer, late teens. Disciplined Olympic hopeful with unwavering focus. Short dark hair, lean athletic build. Intense concentrated dark eyes. National team training uniform with a recurve bow drawn at full extension, arrow nocked. Standing on an archery range with targets in the distance. Fierce focused expression — during late-night training at the field behind the blood center, his arrow hit an unmarked metal ventilation shaft that emitted a sound like machinery running deep underground.

characters.name: 조민우
characters.title: 스피드큐빙 챔피언
characters.prompt: Male Korean speed cubing champion, late teens. Genius puzzle solver with the fastest hands in the country. Messy dark hair, youthful face with acne. Bright hyper-focused dark eyes. School uniform jacket open over a graphic T-shirt, Rubik's cube in each hand. Sitting at a competition desk with a timer. Excited restless expression — he volunteers at the blood center for community service hours and decoded the encrypted label system on the restricted storage room doors in under a minute, revealing a filing system older than modern Korean.

characters.name: 니샤 구룽
characters.title: 네팔 등산 가이드
characters.prompt: Female Nepalese mountain guide, mid-35s. High-altitude veteran who has summited Everest three times. Weathered bronze face with sun-cracked lips. Fierce resilient dark eyes. Down jacket with a mountaineering company patch, ice axe strapped to her pack. Standing on a snowy ridge with Himalayan peaks behind her. Tough determined expression — she guided a Kartein expedition to a secret cave at 6,000 meters in the Himalayas that contained preserved blood stores sealed in stone amphorae dating back over a thousand years.

characters.name: 윤서준
characters.title: 센터 혈액분리 기술자
characters.prompt: Male Korean center blood separation technician, mid-25s. Quiet specialist who processes blood into components. Neat dark hair under a surgical cap. Focused steady dark eyes. Blue scrubs with a blood processing lab badge, adjusting controls on a centrifuge machine. Standing in a sterile processing room with blood bags being separated into plasma and packed red cells. Careful methodical expression — the blood separation protocols for the VIP samples require a centrifuge speed and duration that should destroy normal blood cells, yet the results show perfect separation with zero hemolysis.

characters.name: 마르가레테 폰 하겐
characters.title: 카르테인 서예가
characters.prompt: Female German calligrapher, appears 50s but with the steady hand of a master. Living repository of written tradition. Silver-white hair in an elegant chignon. Pale blue eyes with centuries of literacy. Black velvet dress with antique pearl buttons, holding a quill pen dipped in dark crimson ink. Seated at an ornate writing desk with illuminated manuscripts and wax seals. Serene authoritative expression — she has hand-written every Kartein family decree for generations in a script that predates all modern European calligraphy, using ink made from a recipe known only to her.

characters.name: 오연수
characters.title: 센터 혈액형 판정 전문관
characters.prompt: Female Korean center blood typing specialist, late 38s. Supreme expert in blood group serology. Dark hair in a crisp bob, immaculate lab hygiene. Intensely focused dark eyes. Pristine white coat in a reference lab with antibody panels and cross-match trays. Examining agglutination patterns under a microscope with a pipette in hand. Deeply troubled expression — she identified a blood sample that reacts with every known antiserum yet is compatible with all blood types simultaneously, which is immunologically impossible.

characters.name: 할리드 압둘라
characters.title: 카르테인 경주마 목장 소유주
characters.prompt: Male Saudi-British polo club and horse ranch owner, appears late 50s. Desert aristocrat with thoroughbred blood. Distinguished grey hair, dark olive skin. Commanding dark eyes with gold flecks. Bespoke riding jacket over a crisp white shirt with a diamond tiepin and Arabian horse crest cufflinks. Standing beside a magnificent black stallion at a private polo field. Regal imperious expression — his championship horse bloodline research is a cover for the Kartein's human blood genetics program, and his veterinary facilities house the family's most advanced hematology equipment.

characters.name: 권준성
characters.title: 센터 혈액 수송 네트워크 관제사
characters.prompt: Male Korean center blood transport network controller, early 40s. Logistics nerve center operator. Short dark hair, firm jaw. Alert commanding dark eyes with the glow of tracking screens. White shirt with a transport operations badge, headset on. Seated at a control console with GPS tracking maps showing blood transport vehicles across Korea. Intense monitoring expression — the tracking system shows authorized routes during the day, but at midnight certain vehicles' GPS signals vanish for exactly four hours before reappearing at their destination with shorter mileage than the official route.

characters.name: 민수연
characters.title: 전통 매듭 공예가
characters.prompt: Female Korean traditional knot craft artisan, late 50s. Patient keeper of an ancient textile art. Grey-streaked dark hair with a simple pin. Calm wise dark eyes. Traditional hanbok jeogori in muted ivory with an artisan's apron, silk cords and decorative knots spread before her on a work table. Tying an intricate maedeup knot in crimson silk. Contemplative expression — a European collector commissioned a series of knots based on patterns from a medieval manuscript, and the patterns match blood vessel structures she's never seen in any anatomy text.

characters.name: 소피 맥두걸
characters.title: 에든버러 고서적상 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Scottish rare book dealer cover in Edinburgh, appears late 48s. Scholarly antiquarian surrounded by forbidden knowledge. Thick auburn hair with grey streaks, tortoiseshell reading glasses. Shrewd intelligent green eyes. Tweed jacket over a burgundy sweater with an antique book-shaped brooch. Standing in a cramped shop overflowing with leather-bound books and old maps on Edinburgh's Royal Mile. Knowing expression — her rare bookshop contains a sealed vault of Kartein family records written on vellum in blood, documenting their lineage back to pre-Roman Britain.

characters.name: 정해솔
characters.title: 센터 사회공헌팀 팀장
characters.prompt: Male Korean center social contribution team leader, mid-35s. Idealistic CSR manager building community partnerships. Neat dark hair with a warm approachable face. Bright motivated dark eyes. Smart casual with a center badge, holding a community partnership proposal folder. Standing at a community event with donation campaign banners. Enthusiastic expression — his latest partnership with a European philanthropic foundation brought unprecedented funding, but the foundation's donor list includes people whose public records show they died decades ago.

characters.name: 솜차이 랏타나
characters.title: 방콕 무에타이 체육관장 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Thai Muay Thai gym owner cover in Bangkok, appears mid-40s. Powerful fighter turned trainer with a dangerous calm. Shaved head, scarred eyebrow, muscular build with traditional Sak Yant tattoos on arms and chest. Intense dark brown eyes. Red Muay Thai shorts with mongkon headband around one bicep, hand wraps on. Standing in a traditional Bangkok gym with heavy bags and rope ring. Fearsome composed expression — his fight gym trains Kartein's physical operatives and the gym's basement has a blood bank disguised as a sports medicine recovery center.

characters.name: 남지영
characters.title: 센터 미생물검사실 실장
characters.prompt: Female Korean center microbiology lab director, early 40s. Rigorous scientist guarding blood safety. Dark hair pinned neatly under a lab cap. Sharp precise dark eyes behind protective goggles pushed up. Sterile white coat in a BSL-3 laboratory with biohazard signage. Examining bacterial culture plates under a laminar flow hood with forceps. Stern methodical expression — her routine contamination screening of blood donations revealed a microorganism she cannot classify, one that thrives only in certain donor samples and appears to enhance rather than damage blood cells.

characters.name: 찬 소피아
characters.title: 캄보디아 실크 상인 (위장)
characters.prompt: Female Cambodian silk trader cover in Phnom Penh, appears early 30s. Graceful artisan with ancient Khmer poise. Long straight black hair with a gold clip. Gentle dark brown eyes with quiet authority. Sampot silk wrap skirt in deep garnet with a white blouse, holding a bolt of iridescent silk. Standing in a traditional weaving workshop with looms. Serene gracious expression — her silk trade between Cambodia and Europe conceals blood products sealed in the hollow cores of hand-carved wooden loom shuttles, a smuggling method unchanged since the Angkor empire.

characters.name: 최예진
characters.title: 센터 혈액냉장고 관리 기사
characters.prompt: Female Korean center blood refrigerator technician, late 20s. Cold-room specialist who maintains critical storage temperatures. Dark hair under a warm hood, slightly red nose from cold. Resilient dark eyes. Insulated blue uniform with a center badge and thermal gloves, checking temperature gauges on walk-in blood bank refrigerators. Standing in a cold room with rows of blood bags organized by type. Shivering but vigilant expression — one refrigeration unit in the restricted section maintains a temperature ten degrees colder than any blood storage protocol requires, and it's secured by a lock she has no key for.

characters.name: 타시 왕모
characters.title: 카르테인 티베트 약초 전문가
characters.prompt: Female Tibetan herbal specialist for the Kartein, appears 60s but radiates ageless vitality. Mountain sage with impossible knowledge. Long grey-black braided hair with turquoise beads. Deep calm dark eyes that seem to look through time. Layered Tibetan chuba robe in deep indigo with coral and silver jewelry. Surrounded by dried herbs, minerals, and strange roots in a Himalayan apothecary. Wise unfathomable expression — she formulates the herbal compounds that allow the Kartein to walk in sunlight, using recipes from a tradition that extends beyond recorded history.

characters.name: 배정원
characters.title: 센터 수혈감시 전담 간호사
characters.prompt: Male Korean center transfusion monitoring nurse, early 30s. Vigilant guardian of transfusion safety. Clean dark hair, calm alert face. Steady watchful dark eyes. White scrubs with a transfusion safety badge, portable monitoring device in hand showing vital signs. Standing at a patient's bedside with an IV blood bag infusing. Concentrating attentive expression — one patient who received blood from the restricted supply showed a transfusion reaction that reversed within seconds, her wounds healing visibly before his eyes.

characters.name: 윈 먓
characters.title: 미얀마 승려 출신 의학자
characters.prompt: Male Burmese former monk turned medical scientist, early 40s. Contemplative healer bridging ancient wisdom and modern medicine. Shaved head, warm bronze skin. Serene penetrating dark eyes. Simple white medical coat over a cotton longyi, Buddhist prayer beads on one wrist. Holding a medical journal and a palm-leaf manuscript side by side in a research library. Quietly astonished expression — his parallel study of ancient Pali medical texts and modern hematology data reveals that Buddhist monks documented 'undying blood' cases centuries before Western medicine existed.

characters.name: 전다은
characters.title: 센터 혈액정보시스템 개발자
characters.prompt: Female Korean center blood information system developer, late 20s. Code-writing prodigy maintaining the center's digital backbone. Dark hair in a messy ponytail with a mechanical keyboard keycap necklace. Sharp focused dark eyes reflecting multiple code editors. Casual tech attire with noise-canceling headphones and center developer badge. Typing rapidly on a custom keyboard with green-lit terminal screens. Intensely concentrated expression — while debugging the center's blood tracking database, she found a hidden partition encrypted with an algorithm that predates modern computing, containing donor records going back to 1823.

characters.name: 마커스 오세이
characters.title: 트리니다드 카니발 디자이너 (위장)
characters.prompt: Male Trinidadian carnival costume designer cover, appears mid-35s. Flamboyant artist with celebrations in his blood. Short-cropped dark hair with gold-tipped sideburns, rich dark brown skin. Bright creative dark eyes. Vibrant purple silk shirt with gold vest, measuring tape draped over shoulders. Standing amid towering carnival costumes with feathers and sequins in his Port of Spain workshop. Dazzling theatrical expression — his carnival troupe tours globally as a Kartein social event cover, and the elaborate costumes contain hidden pockets for transporting blood vials across borders during festival seasons.

characters.name: 유인영
characters.title: 센터 헌혈 부적합 판정관
characters.prompt: Female Korean center donation eligibility screener, mid-35s. Decisive medical gatekeeper for all donors. Neat dark hair, professional makeup. Firm clear dark eyes. White nurse coat with a screening department badge, blood pressure cuff and questionnaire form in hand. Sitting across from a donor in a private screening booth. Serious evaluating expression — she has standing orders to immediately notify a special contact number whenever a donor with certain rare genetic markers appears, and the number connects to a European exchange.

characters.name: 우고 카스티요
characters.title: 카르테인 사유지 관리인
characters.prompt: Male Chilean private estate caretaker, appears early 60s but with the vitality of a much younger man. Remote guardian of the Kartein's most secret refuge. Weathered brown skin, thick grey hair windswept. Deep knowing dark eyes. Heavy ranch coat over work clothes with a ring of ancient iron keys. Standing at the gates of a vast Patagonian estate with snow-capped Andes behind him. Solemn protective expression — he has maintained the Kartein's southernmost sanctuary for what he claims is forty years, but estate records suggest someone with his exact description has been caretaker for over two centuries.

characters.name: 김나래
characters.title: 센터 자원봉사 청소년 지도자
characters.prompt: Female Korean center youth volunteer leader, late 20s. Energetic mentor inspiring teenage volunteers. Bright dark hair in a high ponytail with a scrunchie. Cheerful encouraging dark eyes. Colorful center volunteer T-shirt with a whistle around neck, activity schedule clipboard. Standing with a group of teenage volunteers in the donation waiting area. Warm motivating expression — she leads weekend volunteer programs but was told certain corridors are permanently off-limits to youth groups, with no explanation beyond 'insurance liability.'

characters.name: 아르준 타파
characters.title: 카르테인 네팔 사원 관리인
characters.prompt: Male Nepalese temple caretaker for the Kartein, appears mid-50s. Devoted guardian of a sacred Himalayan site. Weathered bronze face with a thick dark mustache. Calm devoted dark eyes. Traditional Nepali daura suruwal with a topi cap and a brass temple key on a cord. Standing at the entrance of an ornate mountain temple with prayer flags fluttering. Peaceful watchful expression — the ancient temple he guards contains a spring whose water has properties identical to the Kartein's blood preservation solution, and pilgrims who drink from it report extraordinary healing.

characters.name: 권예빈
characters.title: 센터 통계분석관
characters.prompt: Female Korean center statistics analyst, late 20s. Data scientist finding patterns in numbers. Neat dark hair with minimalist style. Intense focused dark eyes behind thin-framed glasses. Clean blouse with a center analytics badge, dual monitors showing R programming output and statistical models. Pointing at a graph showing anomalous donation frequency patterns. Alarmed expression — her regression analysis reveals that blood usage spikes correlate perfectly with lunar cycles, a pattern that has no medical explanation but has persisted consistently for every year she has data.

characters.name: 조경수
characters.title: 심해잠수정 조종사
characters.prompt: Male Korean deep-sea submersible pilot, mid-40s. Pressure-hardened explorer of the abyss. Lean strong build, greying dark hair with a permanent tan. Steady fearless dark eyes. Navy flight-suit style uniform with a research institute badge, holding a sonar readout printout. Standing before a deep-sea submersible with mechanical arms and floodlights. Gravely serious expression — during a deep trench survey off the Korean coast, his submersible's sonar detected a massive artificial structure at 3,000 meters, and when he descended, the structure's walls were carved with the same crest he later recognized on the blood center director's signet ring.

characters.name: 속 찬나리
characters.title: 카르테인 앙코르 유적 복원가
characters.prompt: Female Cambodian Angkor ruins restoration specialist for the Kartein, appears early 40s. Archaeological guardian of an ancient alliance. Dark hair adorned with a gold clip shaped like an apsara. Serene knowledgeable dark eyes. Khaki field clothes with an archaeological badge and traditional krama scarf in saffron. Holding restoration tools before a hidden temple relief at Angkor showing blood-offering scenes. Reverential expression — she oversees the restoration of Angkor temples that contain sealed chambers predating the Khmer Empire, chambers that hold evidence of the Kartein's presence in Southeast Asia a thousand years before their European records begin.

characters.name: 백준우
characters.title: 센터 수혈키트 제조감독
characters.prompt: Male Korean center transfusion kit manufacturing supervisor, mid-40s. Quality-focused production manager. Short dark hair with flecks of grey, strong reliable build. Steady meticulous dark eyes. Blue factory coat with a production floor badge, holding a precision caliper and a blood collection bag from the assembly line. Standing in a clean manufacturing facility with automated packaging equipment. Careful attentive expression — the special-order blood bags produced on the night shift use a polymer he cannot find in any medical supply catalog, and their internal coating prevents blood from degrading far beyond any commercial product's capability.

characters.name: 연서현
characters.title: 센터 재활의학 연구원
characters.prompt: Female Korean center rehabilitation medicine researcher, early 30s. Dedicated scientist studying post-transfusion recovery. Dark hair with a simple pearl hairpin. Thoughtful focused dark eyes. Lab coat over a periwinkle sweater with a research department badge. Reviewing patient recovery data on a laptop in a bright research office. Puzzled expression — her study of post-transfusion outcomes shows that patients who received blood from the restricted supply recover from injuries at three times the normal rate, with tissue regeneration patterns that shouldn't be physiologically possible.

characters.name: 핫산 마흐디
characters.title: 카르테인 소말리아 해운 연락관
characters.prompt: Male Somali-born maritime liaison for the Kartein, appears mid-40s. Seafaring strategist who controls the Horn of Africa route. Dark skin weathered by salt wind, close-cropped black hair. Piercing intense dark eyes. White linen shirt with a navigator's compass pendant, standing on the bridge of a cargo vessel at sunset over the Indian Ocean. Holding maritime charts with routes marked in red ink. Commanding solitary expression — he oversees the Kartein's blood shipment corridor from East Africa to the Middle East through waters so dangerous that only his network of contacts can guarantee safe passage.

characters.name: 임정윤
characters.title: 센터 혈액안전 감시자
characters.prompt: Female Korean center hemovigilance officer, mid-40s. Unwavering safety watchdog with zero tolerance for risk. Stern dark hair in a tight chignon. Unflinching piercing dark eyes. Dark blazer over a white blouse with a national hemovigilance committee badge. Holding a thick adverse event report folder and a red alert notification. Standing in the center's safety control room with incident tracking boards. Resolute grim expression — she reported a pattern of adverse transfusion events that violate every known immunological principle to the national committee, and her report was classified and sealed by an authority she's never heard of.
